Name: Stichting Helden van Hackforts
Description:
Wij willen midden in de samenleving een thuis ontwikkelen voor jonge mensen met een licht verstandelijke beperking waarbij hun kwaliteit van leven nu en in de toekomst centraal staat. Onder thuis verstaan wij: Een omgeving die zij hun thuis noemen en waar ze blijvend kunnen wonen en werken. Waarin zij zich -binnen hun capaciteiten én ieders individuele behoefte- blijven ontwikkelen. 
Onze doelgroep hierbij zijn jongeren met een licht verstandelijke beperking die geen zware zorg nodig hebben, maar wel aansturing en begeleiding op een aantal vlakken. 
Wij geloven er sterk in dat voorwaarden voor kwaliteit van leven te maken hebben met zelfredzaamheid, zelfvertrouwen, respect en onderdeel uitmaken van een gemeenschap. Vriendschap en verbinding staan daarbij aan de basis en worden gestimuleerd, net als contacten met dorpsgenoten. De begeleiding is gericht op het vergroten van zelfredzaamheid. Daarvoor zal 24-uurs nabijheid van zorg worden gerealiseerd. Overdag om “met de handen op de rug” hulp te bieden bij het organiseren van huishouden en werk/dagbesteding. In de nacht is er een slaapwacht, zodat er nabijheid van zorg is, mochten er calamiteiten zijn.

Als de jongeren een vast gezicht in de samenleving zijn, zal stigmatisering afnemen en waardering en inclusie toenemen. Realisatie van deze woonvorm, waarbij jongeren met een verstandelijke beperking de kans wordt geboden om echt onderdeel uit te maken van een lokale gemeenschap, past naar onze mening voor 100% bij de breed gedragen wens om een ‘inclusieve’ samenleving te creëren. Hieraan neemt iedereen -óók mensen met een beperking- volwaardig en vanzelfsprekend deel.
Om inclusie te bevorderen zal het werk voor een deel bestaan uit onderhoud van huis en omgeving en daarnaast ook uit het leveren van diensten aan de samenleving waarin het huis staat. Door het werk dat gedaan wordt breder te trekken, kunnen de jongeren zich inzetten voor de buurt. Denk aan klusjes voor buren, tuinonderhoud, uitlaatservice etc.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: The CARE Village
Description:
Our village on the shores of Lake Rotorua is a world-leading concept that is just like any other small New Zealand town.
In our village, the elderly, including those with dementia, don’t just exist, they thrive on a lifestyle as normal as possible. The unique design of the village, and the way its residents are cared for, is centred around evidence that suggests familiarity, comfort and stimulation has the greatest impact on overall health.
Visit our website for more information https://thecarevillage.co.nz/
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Alterszentrum St. Bernhard
Description:
Ein Ort zum Wohlfühlen
Das St. Bernhard bietet rund 140 Bewohnenden ein liebevolles neues Zuhause.

Im Alterszentrum St. Bernhard steht das Wohlbefinden der Bewohnenden im Mittelpunkt. Dazu gehören neben der bedürfnisorientierten Pflege und Betreuung auch eine innovative Gastronomie mit marktfrischer Küche und ein umfassendes Dienstleistungsangebot fürs Wohnen und Leben im Alter. Helle, breite Gänge und eine gepflegte Gartenanlage mit vielen bequemen Sitzgelegenheiten laden zum Spazieren und Verweilen ein. Im Haus befinden sich neben einem Coiffeursalon, der Physiotherapie und Fusspflege auch eine Cafeteria und unser öffentliches Restaurant «Culinario», wo sich Bewohnende und Besucherinnen und Besucher mit leckeren Schweizer Spezialitäten verköstigen können. Im St. Bernhard können Sie Ihren Alltag in modernem und gleichzeitig sehr wohnlichem Ambiente vielseitig gestalten und geniessen.

Wir freuen uns auf Sie!

Name: Immanuel Living
Description:
As a not-for-profit Life Plan Community, we offer retirement choices that embrace a philosophy of dignified care for the whole person. At Immanuel Living, our residents lead fulfilling and balanced lifestyles by incorporating six dimensions of wellness into every aspect of care we provide: Physical, Emotional, Intellectual, Social, Spiritual, and Occupational.

Providing resident-focused care that is professional and compassionate, and that can be obtained all in one location, is important for helping residents to age in place—which is why we’ve expanded to serve a wider variety of needs, over the years. The services in our loving continuum-of-care include: residential living, assisted living, rehabilitation, skilled nursing, and memory care. 

Even with added services and growth, we’ve remained committed to our residents’ happiness. That’s the history of integrity for which we’re known: People respect us, and we’re determined to never let them down. Locally based and not-for-profit, at Immanuel Living, we serve seniors the way they need to be served: with whatever they need.

Name: Calm Futures
Description:
We are Calm Futures, dedicated to providing exceptional support to individuals with learning or physical disabilities, acquired brain injuries, autism, or mental health challenges. Our commitment to being ESG-aligned drives us to make a meaningful social impact.

Each day, we work to transform the lives of some of the most vulnerable members of our society. With our experience and expertise, we guide individuals on their path to greater independence, helping them lead fulfilling lives.

For over a decade, our Management Team has been at the forefront of innovation in supported living and residential care, developing a range of services tailored to individual needs within the comfort of their own homes.

Our success is made possible by our talented and dedicated staff, who deliver high-quality support, respect dignity, empower choice, and prioritize those we serve.

Our corporate values are the foundation of everything we do, seamlessly integrating our ESG journey into our daily operations

Name: Signature Senior Lifestyle - Developments
Description:
In order to provide the best environment, Signature has to build its own brand of care community. Each and every home needs to be in the right place and designed and built to our high and exact standards. To achieve this we need to find land for our communities, design the buildings, obtain planning permission and construct the homes. This is often a complicated and difficult process but we feel it is worthwhile to have the best homes for our residents.

Signature is helping to address a growing need to increase the amount of specialised care accommodation for the elderly. The elderly population is increasing, with people not only living longer but also needing greater support for longer. The prevalence of dementia is also unfortunately increasing. At the same, time many existing care homes in the UK do not meet people’s expectations with a high proportion of homes still not even providing en suite bathrooms.

As developer and operator, Signature has a long-term commitment to its site and the local community. We are dedicated to being good neighbours and enhancing local communities by providing much-needed care and accommodation. We wish to build and maintain good relationships with local residents and organisations.

 Call +91 9924009930 to discuss your care needs and discover how we can help.

Name: All Things Aged Care
Description:
Welcome to All Things Aged Care, your new go-to destination for the latest news and insights in the aged care sector.

Think of us as a weekly get-together with some industry enthusiasts & experts to unpack the latest headlines, share honest perspectives, and answer your most pressing questions, all with a beer in hand.

Your panel of hosts includes trusted industry figures like Robert Covino (CEO & Founder of Mirus Australia), Owen Matheson (CEO, Co-Founder, Mission Critical Group), and Anthony Nguyen (from the Pioneers in Aged Care Podcast). Together, we tackle everything from complex aged care issues to the latest start-ups and innovations. Each week, we'll also feature a different special guest to add their unique voice to the conversation.

We want to hear from you! If you have a question, an issue, a start-up that needs a shout-out, a colleague you want to celebrate or even just an opinion on whatever we are discussing, this is the place to do it. 

Don't miss our live stream, the All Things Aged Care Weekly Wrap Up, every Friday. We're here to make sense of the aged care world, one honest conversation at a time.

Description:

We recognize the vital role families play as advocates and partners in our residents' care journeys. Their input, along with insights from our experienced staff and medical professionals, informs the development of individualized service plans aimed at optimizing each resident's well-being.
Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our core values: Communication, Compassion, Dignity, Empathy, Integrity, Pride, Respect, and Responsiveness. These values guide every aspect of our work as we strive to exceed expectations and uphold the highest standards of care.
Join us at Parkway Pavilion, where every resident is treated with the utmost respect and receives personalized attention to support their health and happiness.

Lively conversations fill grand hallways. Opportunities for friendship, fitness, and enjoyment are around every corner. And, you can enjoy it all knowing extra help is always there when you need it at Sunnyside Manor, the best senior living community in Wall NJ.

Name: Vi CARE
Description:
ViCare is Vancouver Island’s first Senior Living Transparency Platform—designed for families, by insiders who’ve seen how the system really works.

Every year, families in crisis overpay or choose poorly because of vague marketing, hidden costs, or rushed discharge decisions. We’re changing that with a mission rooted in truth, empathy, and data.

Our Mission:
To solve the $300M problem where families overpay for senior care due to gatekeeping, misinformation, and high-pressure sales tactics. We believe your mom deserves better—and so do you.

What We Offer:
 Real Pricing – Family-submitted, verified monthly costs
 Unbiased Reviews – Crowdsourced, AI-verified, no fluff
 Legal + Financial Guides – Understand power of attorney, public vs. private care, waitlists, and more
 AI Tools – Compare communities, costs, services, and care levels in seconds
 No Ads. No Sales Pitches. No Commissions. Just facts.

Built for the overwhelmed adult child navigating mom’s hospital discharge, trying to find a safe place fast—without regret.
Built for discharge planners who are tired of calling around with no system.
Built for operators who actually want to be known for quality, not spin.

ViCare is the “Expedia for senior living”—but with values.
We’re creating the one source of truth families can trust, backed by structured data, lived experiences, and verified provider transparency.

 Starting on Vancouver Island.
 Built here. Growing everywhere.

 Visit www.vicare.ca
 Contact: cherish@vicare.ca
 Partner With Us: If you run a high-integrity community, we’d love to help you stand out.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Tuana Pflegebox GmbH
Description:
Die häusliche Pflege ist vielen Angehörigen eine Herzensangelegenheit. Dazu werden Pflegehilfsmittel wie beispielsweise Einmalhandschuhe, Bettschutzeinlagen, Hände- und Flächendesinfektion und Inkontinenzartikel benötigt. Die Tuana Pflegebox GmbH ist Ihr optimaler Ansprechpartner für genau solche Pflegehilfsmittel. Mit ihrer langjährigen Expertise in der Pflegebranche weiß das Unternehmen, worauf es ankommt und welche Produkte Ihnen den Alltag erleichtern.

Jeder Versicherte hat einen gesetzlichen Erstattungsanspruch auf zum Verbrauch bestimmter Pflegehilfsmittel im Wert von bis zu 40 Euro monatlich. Für solche Fragen und mehr steht Ihnen unser kompetentes Team jederzeit mit Rat und Tat zur Seite. Die Tuana Pflegebox GmbH setzt dabei ausschließlich auf hochwertige Marken- und Qualitätsprodukte sowie eine umfassende Beratung.

Möchten auch Sie Ihren Pflegealltag erleichtern? Dann rufen Sie noch heute an und vereinbaren einen unverbindlichen Termin für ein kostenfreies Erstgespräch.
Das Team der Tuana Pflegebox freut sich auf Ihre Kontaktaufnahme.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Premium Care Group
Description:
Premium Care Group offer residential and nursing care in a safe, comfortable and happy environment.

Our properties are first and foremost our residents’ home, and as such are made up of our residents, staff members and the wider community. We also include the friends and family of our residents too, who are always an important part of our home.

We understand the needs of our residents, respect their rights to informed choices and privacy and treat each and every person with dignity and respect. 

Equally important is for everyone to live their life to the fullest, to enhance a sense of well-being, self-worth and fulfilment. This is a daily priority in our homes so that residents feel valued and have a sense of belonging.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Tenfold Senior Living
Description:
Different by Design

Tenfold communities offer truly independent senior living in a real community, where shared experiences are balanced by attention to individual interests. Our residents make a contribution every day - to one another, to the community,
and to the world around us.

With truly independent lifestyle as our mission, we focus on details, going the extra mile (and making the additional investment) that provides our residents with the right amenities and support for truly independent living.

You’ll see it in our apartments, our common spaces and in the delivery of smart services at all levels of care. Our residents enjoy multiple dining options, beautiful outdoor spaces where they can gather, entertain, walk and garden, and dedicated facilities for fitness, activities and entertainment.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Careproof - Der Prüfdienst der PKV
Description:
Careproof - der größte Prüfdienst Deutschlands mit Sitz in Köln - ist eine 100-prozentige Tochtergesellschaft des Verbandes der Privaten Krankenversicherung (PKV).

Wir setzen uns für die Bedürfnisse sowie für das Wohl der Menschen mit Pflegebedürftigkeit ein. Daher überprüft Careproof bundesweit die Qualität in stationären, teilstationären und ambulanten Pflegeeinrichtungen - kompetent und partnerschaftlich. Somit setzen wir die gesetzlich vorgeschriebenen Qualitätsprüfungen nach § 114 ff SGB XI um.

Nach diesen rechtlichen Grundlagen erfassen wir als Prüfdienst der PKV die Qualität der Pflegeeinrichtung nach einheitlichen Kriterien. So schaffen wir auch Transparenz für alle Beteiligten.

Darüber hinaus beraten und unterstützen wir mit unserer Expertise Beschäftigte in der Pflegebranche - von der Geschäftsleitung bis zur Pflegekraft. 

Unser Ziel: für noch mehr Qualität in der Pflege zu sorgen und Verbesserungen auf dem Gebiet voranzutreiben.

𝐖𝐚𝐬 𝐮𝐧𝐬 𝐚𝐮𝐬𝐦𝐚𝐜𝐡𝐭

+ Wir prüfen als Partner der Pflegeeinrichtungen mit Sachverstand und Augenmaß.
+ Wir verstehen uns als Interessenvertreter für Menschen mit Pflegebedürftigkeit sowie als Berater der Leistungserbringer.
+ Wir legen großen Wert auf Respekt und Vertrauen während der Qualitätsprüfung in Ihrer Einrichtung 
+ Wir begegnen Ihnen wertschätzend und auf Augenhöhe.

𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐧 𝐒𝐢𝐞 𝐯𝐨𝐧 𝐮𝐧𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐦 𝐖𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐧

In unseren zielorientierten Seminaren rund um die Themen Pflege und Pflegequalität machen wir Führungskräfte und ihre Teams in der Pflege stark für die Zukunft durch: Impulsvorträge, Kurz-Webinare, Workshop-Webinare, Inhouse-Seminare, Schulungen.

Wir stimmen unser Seminarangebot auf die Bedürfnisse und Herausforderungen Ihrer Einrichtung ab. Unsere Referentinnen und Referenten sind erfahrene Qualitätsprüferinnen und Qualitätsprüfer. Zudem verfügen sie über mehrjährige Expertise als Pflegefachkraft. 

Wir sind ein zuverlässiger Partner für Qualitätsprüfungen und Seminare.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Emerge Care & Therapeutic Solutions Limited & Excel Solutions Limited
Description:
At Emerge Care the physical and emotional well-being of our children and young people is at the core of what we provide in supporting them to grow, develop and have their best lives.  
When a young person arrives, often with a number of emotional and behavioural difficulties, we offer the best in the field care and therapeutic support. 
It is these values and core beliefs that are encapsulated in our Therapeutic Model that support our vision of enabling each young person to develop and maintain healthy relationships building upon the skills to manage their emotions whilst processing any previous trauma.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Riverview Retirement Community
Description: Riverview Retirement Community is a company based out of 1801 E Upriver Dr., Spokane, Washington, United States. We provide assisted and independent living apartments in our Terrace, and independent living in our Village homes, which are buy-in opportunities.  We also provide secure and loving memory care assisted living in our Veranda.   We value employees and serve our residents first by engaging in daily activities with them.  Our CEO and Finance teams are on-site, as we have operated locally since 1959.  No out-of-state ownership or leadership.   Our board of directors is made up of representatives from surrounding Lutheran churches.   We have a chaplain on-site, excellent food provided by Chef Tony Usher, a workshop that includes a teacher 4 days a week, and an aquatic and fitness center.   Come take a tour and learn more about us!  We value our residents and their families, you will feel the difference in care and community at Riverview.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Pflegeheime der Stadt Aarau
Description: Die Stadt Aarau führt als Eigenwirtschaftsbetrieb die beiden Häuser Herosé und Golatti. Insgesamt stehen 174 Betten für die stationäre Langzeitpflege zur Verfügung.

Name: Fondazione Benefattori Cremaschi Onlus
Description:
Siamo un Ente non profit e da oltre 500 anni ci prendiamo cura delle Persone e della loro salute, promuovendo benessere sia in ambito sanitario che sociale. 

Mettiamo a disposizione un'ampia offerta di Servizi e partecipiamo a diverse coprogettazioni locali, convinti che grazie alla professionalità del personale e all'unione delle forze si possa, insieme, garantire assistenza sociosanitaria alle Persone della nostra Comunità.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Wentworth Senior Living
Description:
Located in the heart of downtown Portsmouth, NH Wentworth Senior Living is a nonprofit senior living community dedicated to ensuring ALL local seniors are receiving independence when they want it and care when they need it.

Although we can provide the comprehensive healthcare services available in a nursing home, we’re anything but. Our living spaces are quiet and comfortable. Clinical support is offered, as needed, in a private, respectful manner within residents’ own apartments. Common areas remain communal, cozy, and home-like, devoid of distracting and noisy nurses’ stations. 

Our highly trained professional staff values the time they take to engage and build relationships with residents they genuinely respect and love. 

We are a hybrid provider of senior services, only one component of which is residential. Both within and beyond our physical walls, we advocate for seniors while honoring their individual strengths and capacities. As a nonprofit, our philanthropy and programming help all seniors in the community live healthy, connected lives.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Avodah
Description:
Een goede woon- en werkplek voor mensen met een beperking, waar we samen ons leven delen en meedenken en/of elkaar aanvullen waar nodig. Een plek waar je je thuis voelt, waar je kunt leven, je doelen kunt nastreven, je tijd zinvol kunt invullen en genieten van het goede.

We bieden een zelfstandige woonplek met een eigen voordeur, woonkamer met keuken, slaapkamer, badkamer en terras. Deze woonruimtes zijn gelegen op de begane grond of op de verdieping.

Daarnaast bieden we dagbesteding aan op of nabij het terrein. Dit wordt kleinschalige horeca in het Ontmoetingshuis, werken in het groen en houtbewerking vanuit de Werkschuur en werk voor lokale ondernemers.

Het is mogelijk om wonen en dagbesteding te combineren, maar alleen wonen of dagbesteding is ook mogelijk.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Alters- und Pflegezentrum Bruggwiesen
Description: Das Alters- und Pflegezentrum Bruggwiesen bietet Pflege und Betreuung für bis zu 159 Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner an. Nebst der Kurz- und Langzeitpflege verfügen wir über ein Tageszentrum, einer Aussenwohngruppe sowie einem öffentlich zugänglichen Restaurant.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: The Moments
Description: The Moments is a completely fresh approach to specialized memory support. Our senior living environment is custom-made to assure the highest standard of care for individuals living with dementia or living with early onset dementia. We’ve thoughtfully considered caregivers, families, and their loved ones in the development of this unique approach. Because we understand the unintended consequences of attempting to manage this complex disease at home, we offer unique specialized memory support and activities for dementia patients. We believe a loss of memory doesn’t equate to a loss of meaning.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Wohnstift Karlsruhe e.V. & KFLS Stiftung
Description:
Der Wohnstift Karlsruhe e. V. hat das Ziel, älteren Menschen zu ermöglichen, ihr Leben in sehr gut geführten Häusern so fortzuführen, wie sie es gewohnt sind. Der Wohnstift Karlsruhe e. V. betreibt zwei Anlagen für Betreutes Wohnen mit insgesamt über 500 Appartements, einen ambulanten Pflegedienst, eine Tagespflege in der Residenz Rüppurr und jeweils einen Pflegebereich pro Haus.

Die KFLS-Stiftung in Karlsruhe ist eine selbständige, öffentlich-rechtliche Stiftung mit dem Ziel, betagten Karlsruher Mitbürgerinnen und Mitbürgern eine Heimstätte mit Unterkunft, Verpflegung, Betreuung und Hilfe in derzeit sieben Altenhilfeeinrichtungen zu bieten. Die Häuser der Stiftung ermöglichen Ihnen ein selbstbestimmtes und selbstbewusstes Leben im Alter. Alle Mitarbeitende – seien es Pflegekräfte, Hausmeister, Rezeptionsmitarbeitende, Speisesaal-Service, Raumpfleger oder Verwaltungskräfte – sind stets für Sie da und bilden eine unterstützende und vertrauensvolle Gemeinschaft mit Ihnen und Ihren Betreuern. Und das seit 1830!

About Ascot Care Homes:
We operate seven care homes for over 65s in Horden, Seaburn, Alnwick, Darlington, Durham, Whitley Bay, and South Shields, as well as a Brain Injury and Challenging Behaviours suite in Darlington. Our homes are registered to offer a range of residential care services, including nursing, dementia, physical disability and sensory impairment, and can also accommodate palliative, respite and day care. 
For residential care enquiries, call our Ascot Care Homes team on 0191 493 6920.

Ascot Care Agency is our home care and live-in care service, delivering tailored support to older people and those with complex needs, in the comfort of their own home. For home care, live-in care and temporary staffing enquiries, call the Ascot Care Agency team on 01325 384383.

Name: Honeycomb Care Homes
Description:
Honeycomb provides residential care and support to children and young people aged 5-16 whom local authorities have referred. Due to a range of circumstances, young people are unable to live at home and, therefore, live in a residential care home when foster care can not meet their needs 

Our care home provides a safe, comfortable and supportive home for young people who have experienced trauma and or neglect. Depending on their individual needs, young people will stay in a residential care house that provides the right level of support required at that time.

We believe in combining established best practices with the latest, most effective techniques. Our search for continual improvement means we're always looking for new ways to challenge, delight and unlock the potential of the young people in our care.

Our difference is that we believe in a holistic approach. The smallest details can mean a world of difference to a vulnerable young person. We sweat the small stuff.

We care about young people and want the best for them so they can succeed in life. We have high expectations for them and know that if we listen to them and help them develop, they will have better coping strategies and more resilience. They will make better decisions, have better self-regulation and a better family life.

Name: ZorgKrachtPlus
Description:
ZorgKrachtPlus is een netwerk van 7 woonzorgcentra in West-Vlaanderen die de handen in elkaar slaan om via samenwerking op een aantal deeldomeinen een meerwaarde te kunnen realiseren op vlak van ondersteunende diensten en zorgexcellentie.

We voelen de noodzaak aan om via een netwerk onze schaalgrootte uit te breiden om zodoende onze interne expertise sterker te kunnen ontwikkelen en te delen met elkaar. Ook het benutten van externe expertise willen we nog verder aanscherpen.  Via specialisatie en samenwerking op deeldomeinen (informatica, personeel- en organisatieontwikkeling, infrastructuur, veiligheid, financieel, juridisch,…) willen we gezamenlijk streven naar een professionele en sterkere organisatie.  

De focus op zorg, wonen en leven, de medewerkers en de lokale omgeving blijven de eerste prioriteiten van elke voorziening en het netwerk wil dit ondersteunen. Door goede praktijkvoorbeelden met elkaar te delen, door in  te zetten op specialisatie in de deeldomeinen van de zorg en innovatie te stimuleren willen we de zorgkwaliteit permanent verbeteren. 

Het netwerk is een samenwerkingsverband op lange termijn waarbij elke vzw autonoom blijft functioneren. Door goede praktijkvoorbeelden met elkaar te delen en in te zetten op het ontwikkelen van expertise zal elk huis sterker worden.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Holmegårdsparken
Description:
Holmegårdsparken - et dejligt sted at være beboer.

Holmegårdsparken er et selvejende plejehjem placeret i Charlottenlunds smukke omgivelser tæt på skov og strand. Vi tilbyder pleje og behandling til borgere, der har behov for særlig omsorg og støtte i hverdagen. Livskvalitet og selvudfoldelse er centralt i vores tilgang til pleje. Vi tilstræber at skabe de rammer, der sikrer, at beboeren kan bevare sin identitet, sit sædvanlige liv og sine interesser.

Hjemmet er et indbydende byggeri med moderne boliger og åbenhed til lokalområdet. Der er lagt stor omtanke i designet af boliger og omgivelser, således at stedet understøtter den enkelte og fremstår mindst mulig institutionspræget.

Vi er et hjem med stolte traditioner, der bygger på faglig viden og erfaring. Vi er nysgerrige, og altid opmærksomme på nye metoder i vores behandling og pleje.

Description:
With a combined total of over 40 years experience and background of working in care, we are an interior design company offering a wide range of design schemes exclusively for the care sector.
Offering a flexible menu of services to improve care environments, our clients can select any one, or more of these to complement their own in-house services. Project Management
Bespoke interior design

Procurement including:
-Specialist equipment
-Furniture and soft furnishings
-Curtains, blinds, carpets and flooring.
-Artwork and interior lighting
-Tableware, towels and linen.

We look to create a 'home from home' atmosphere, ensuring optimum comfort and safety for your residents, whilst avoiding an institutional look and feel. Our ethos is that whilst a care home can look smart and stylish, it will fail miserably if it doesn't offer a relaxing and stimulating environment.

A warm atmosphere can be created with creative finishing touches, even when working with a small budget. Soft furnishings can really transform a care home, helping to make it tranquil and welcoming.

Name: Swift Mover Systems
Description:
At Swift Mover Systems, we’re transforming safety, dignity and efficiency in care homes. Around 24% of residents live with poor mobility or a high risk of falls, placing daily strain on both residents and care teams. Traditional hoisting and manual handling are time-consuming, intrusive, and can lead to staff injuries, sickness absence and costly claims.

The Swift Mover System provides a smarter solution. It is a universal unit that fits most care home chairs quickly and simply, instantly converting a static chair into a mobile one—and back again in seconds. (Professional fitting is available.) With a Swift Mover attached, one carer can safely move a resident alone, reducing staffing requirements for transfers and improving workflow across the home.

By reducing the need for hoisting, the Swift Mover helps lower injury risks for staff while delivering faster, smoother and more dignified transfers for residents. This means more time out of their rooms, less isolation, improved mental wellbeing, and a more engaging and inclusive care environment.

The Swift Mover can also assist in emergency evacuations, helping move residents away from smoke-filled or high-risk areas quickly and safely.

Every system comes with 12 months warranty, an annual service, and parts and labour included, with an optional extended Service Plan for full compliance and peace of mind.

Swift Mover Systems – Making care safer, faster and more resident-focused.

- Wij onszelf meerdere malen terugverdienen;

Description:
Proper-Maid was created with one belief: home care should never compromise human dignity.

We saw a system where skilled domestic professionals were undervalued and overlooked, while families faced uncertainty, inconsistent service, and no clear standards. Both sides deserved better.

𝑷𝒓𝒐𝒑𝒆𝒓-𝑴𝒂𝒊𝒅 𝒆𝒙𝒊𝒔𝒕𝒔 𝒕𝒐 𝒓𝒂𝒊𝒔𝒆 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒃𝒂𝒓.

We invest in the well-being, training, and career development of our Home Care Specialists, giving them real opportunities to grow in their work and personal lives. Through structured training, continuous skills development, and followed by UAE Verified MOHRE Compliance standards. Every team member is verified, supported, and guided toward long-term professional progress.

At the same time, we provide families with clearly defined service standards, transparent communication, responsive support, and the peace of mind that comes from knowing exactly what to expect.

Technology plays a key role, making booking simple, communication clear, and service delivery consistent. But the foundation of our work goes deeper than systems. We are building a culture rooted in respect, accountability, and genuine care for everyone involved.

𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐫-𝐌𝐚𝐢𝐝:
a modern, transparent home-care solution where dignity meets service, standards meet care, and every home—and every career—has the chance to grow.

Name: PACIO Project
Description:
The PACIO (Post-Acute Care InterOperability) Project is all about care coordination – Forty-five percent of Medicare patients who leave hospitals go into some kind of post-acute care. Post-acute care accounts for $74 billion in Medicare payments annually, so it is a large part of our healthcare system. Post-acute care patients are typically very complex and have multiple transitions in their healthcare journey.

When a person transitions between healthcare settings, including ambulatory care, acute care, long-term post-acute care (LTPAC), and home- and community-based services (HCBS) – their care is often fragmented and can lead to poor health outcomes, increased burden, and increased costs. Interoperable health information exchange has the potential to improve patient and provider communications and supports access to longitudinal health information that enables improved efficiencies, improved quality of care, and improved health outcomes. Data should be usable across the continuum of care, and beyond the traditional healthcare system – into the community.

Name: De Zorgheimer
Description:
WAAR?
De woonboerderij van de Zorgheimer bevindt zich nabij het dorp Ouwerkerk in de gemeente Schouwen-Duiveland in Zeeland, is kleinschalig van opzet en bestaat uit 15 kamers. 
Door deze opzet krijgen bewoners veel persoonlijke aandacht en wordt er binnen het huis samengeleefd als een grote familie.
Er zijn gemeenschappelijke ruimtes waar de bewoners met elkaar leven, koken, de krant lezen, puzzelen of spelletjes doen.
Door de openslaande deuren van de woonboerderij is de bewegingsvrijheid van de bewoner veilig; zij kunnen wandelen in de beleeftuin, werken in de biologische moestuin, de dieren verzorgen of genieten op het terras van de weide blik.

WIE?
Bij de Zorgheimer wonen mensen met dementie, zoals bijvoorbeeld de ziekte van Alzheimer, die niet meer in zelfstandig kunnen wonen of voor zichzelf kunnen zorgen.
Zij wonen bij de Zorgheimer in een woonhuis waar liefde, aandacht en betrokkenheid centraal staan. 
De Zorgheimer maakt kleinschalig wonen met intensieve zorg mogelijk voor een brede groep mensen. 
Wij doen dit door slimmer te organiseren, met minder managers te werken en effectiever om te gaan met zorggeld.

WANNEER?
Wonen bij de Zorgheimer kan met een CIZ-indicatie 4 of 5.
Een zorgprofiel ontvangt u bij het indicatiebesluit van het Centrum Indicatiestelling Zorg (CIZ).
Informeer gerust naar de mogelijkheden, wij helpen u graag!

Name: Ethereal Sober Living
Description:
“Hi, my name is Nick Battistoni, and I’m starting a sober living home to help people in recovery find stability, community, and the support they need to rebuild their lives. After struggling with addiction myself and seeing the profound impact a supportive environment can have on recovery, I’m committed to providing a space where others can heal and thrive.

“Starting a sober living home is an incredibly rewarding but challenging process, and I’m reaching out for help to make this vision a reality. To create a safe and welcoming space for individuals in recovery, I need funding for the following:
• Rent and utilities: Securing a home or facility that’s comfortable, safe, and located in a peaceful area.
• Renovations and furnishings: Transforming the space into a supportive environment where residents can feel comfortable and begin their healing.
• Staffing and counseling services: Hiring qualified, compassionate staff who will provide one-on-one and group counseling, peer support, and wellness programs.
• Essential supplies: Ensuring the home is stocked with necessities like food, toiletries, and other daily items for the residents.”

“Every dollar donated will go directly towards making this sober living home a reality. Whether it’s helping with rent, furnishing the space, or funding recovery programs, your donation will have a direct, lasting impact on someone’s recovery. If you’re not able to donate, please consider sharing this campaign with your network—it means the world to me and to those who will benefit from this program.”

“Thank you so much for considering donating to this important cause. Your support will help create a safe, transformative space for people in recovery to thrive and live a life free from addiction.”

Name: Studentischer Besuchsdienst Aachen

Daher initiieren wir Patenschaften zwischen Studierenden und Senioren, organisieren Seniorennachmittage und gestalten Seminare für Studierende, bei denen Sie für den Umgang mit älteren Mitmenschen geschult werden. Gerade in Aachen, einer Stadt mit hoher Studierendendichte und vielen jungen Menschen, ist es wichtig den Kontakt zur älteren Generation aufrechtzuerhalten und im Dialog zu bleiben. Wir denken, dass dadurch ein Mehrwert auf beiden Seiten entsteht. Da es bisher keine solche ehrenamtliche Initiative auf Studierendenebene gab, haben wir uns den Aufbau des gegenseitiges Kontaktes als Ziel gesetzt.

Name: APH Biberzelten Lachen
Description:
Im Alters- und Pflegeheim Biberzelten erhalten 68 Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner intensive Pflege und Betreuung rund um die Uhr. Die gesund-heitserhaltende oder palliative Pflege und Behandlung richtet sich nach dem Gesundheitszustand und den spezifischen Wünschen und Bedürfnissen von Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner.

Dank qualifizierten Mitarbeitenden ist eine fachlich kompetente Pflege und Betreuung jederzeit gewährleistet. Die medizinische Versorgung im Alters- und Pflegeheim Biberzelten wird durch die persönlichen Hausärzte gewährleistet. Medizinische Nebenleistungen wie Ergo- Physiotherapie werden durch externe Fachpersonen angeboten.

Neben Langzeitpflegeplätzen werden auch Kurzzeitaufenthalte angeboten, sei es zu Entlastung der pflegenden Angehörigen oder für einen Ferien-aufenthalt.

Trotz einer auf Erhaltung und Förderung der geistigen und körperlichen Mobilität ausgerichteten Pflege, erleben viele Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner im Alters- und Pflegeheim Biberzelten ihren letzten Lebensabschnitt. 
Wenn es gilt Abschied zu nehmen begleiten wir unsere Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner und ihre Angehörigen mit Anteilnahme und fachlich kompetenter Pflege. Ziel ist es die bestmöglichste Lebensqualität durch ein kompetentes Symptom- und Schmerzmanagement zu erhalten oder zu erreichen.

Dabei steht die Achtung der Autonomie, Würde und Selbstbestimmung des Betroffenen an erster Stelle.

Name: Open Door Care
Description:
Open Door Care is a Youth Residential Services provider. Currently our care homes are based in the North west of Ireland in County Sligo. We at Open Door Care provide separated children with the highest standard of accommodation. Each young person under our care is assessed to establish  their individual needs  & a care plan for each young person is established, using a person-centred approach keeping the individual needs at the core of their plan. 

Sligo itself is a nurturing and supportive environment for youths who are new arrivals to the community. We are fortunate to have access to Foroige at 'The Crib' for teenagers to socialise and meet others. Sligo County Council and the National Council of Youth Sports who run community integration events are constantly providing integration opportunities. We are equally lucky in Sligo to hold the prestigious title of 'Volunteering Capital of Europe'. Sligo Volunteer Centre is at the heart of our community welcoming in both youths and adults alike and encouraging integration by assisting volunteer based services. Sligo's Global Kitchen offers an opportunity for different cultures to integrate and educate each other by sharing foods, the Global Kitchen events are hosted regularly in The Model Niland Centre, where a warm welcome awaits all who attend.

We categorise the individual needs of the new arrivals into the following categories... social needs, education and access to youth services, medical and psychological needs, education, access to youth and adult services. 

The team at Open Door Care and I are dedicated to upholding the highest safety standards, maintaining properties, and offering trauma and relationship counselling. Our mission is to empower individuals through educational development, which in turn enriches our local community. My role as an accommodation services provider encompasses health, safety, and efficient property management, ensuring a supportive space for personal growth.

Name: Vancouver Coastal Association of Family Councils
Description:
The Vancouver Coastal Association of Family Councils (VCAFC) represents member Family Councils from long term care homes throughout the Vancouver Coastal Health Authority (VCH). 
•	We are one of 5 Associations of Family Councils, representing resident advocacy in long term care homes (LTC) across all health authorities (HA).
•	 VCAFC is comprised of families and friends of residents. All of us have had lived experience with someone we care about in LTC. We care about resident quality of life. We seek to be educated on the many issues of aging, as well as what advances allow us to consider improving quality of life in LTC. 
•	VCAFC provides a forum for networking Family Councils of LTC in the Vancouver Coastal region to discuss common issues, and work to find solutions, and ultimately, share our concerns and ideas with our VCH Health Authority LTC representatives.  
•	VCAFC meets at the provincial level, bringing systemic issues to the attention of the Ministry of Health and other organizations who support quality of life for residents in LTC.
•	Our provincial assocation of family councils is ILTCCABC: Independent Long Term Care Councils Association of BC

Name: Governor's Glen Memory Care Community
Description:
We are proud to provide an excellent facility for senior citizens who suffer from Alzheimer’s, dementia, or other short-term memory problems. Open since 1999, Governor’s Glen has always been dedicated to providing the best possible service to people with Alzheimer’s, dementia or other memory problems. Our goal is to treat our patients like family, and provide care for their bodies, minds and souls. Our singular mission enables us to provide the best possible care for your loved one.

Our mission is to improve the quality of life of our residents through socialization and stimulation of the body and mind.

Our staff provides a variety of memory care options, including residential living with long-term care, short-term respite care, or adult day programs. We have a licensed nurse on staff and a board certified psychiatrist on call, and our residents also have access to regular podiatrist visits, in-house dentist visits, on-site physical therapy, as well as daily medication management. From our full-time chef who makes nutritious meals every day, to our on-site beauty parlor and barber shop, our residents feel a sense of belonging. Our activities director creates daily fun activities to engage seniors who suffer from cognitive impairment. In addition to exercise classes, we offer activities like pet therapy, music therapy, and sensory stimulation.

We would love for you to stop by so we can say hello and show you our community!

Name: Glanmorfa Care Home Limited
Description:
It is the objective of Glanmorfa Care Home to provide Care to each of its Clients’, whether they are Residential or Day Care, to a standard of excellence which embraces fundamental principles of excellent care practice, and that this may be witnessed and evaluated through the practises, conduct and control of the quality of care in the home.  It is a fundamental ethos that these Clients’ who live in the Home or use the Day Care Service should be able to do so in accordance with our “Philosophy of Care.” 

It is the object of the Home that all Clients’ shall live in and have the use of a clean and safe environment and be treated with respect, dignity and sensitivity to their individual needs and abilities.  Staff will be responsive to the individual needs of the Clients’ and will provide the appropriate degree of care to assure the highest possible “Quality of Life” within the Home.

At Glanmorfa Care Home we aim to provide our Service Users with a secure, relaxed, and homely environment in which their care, well-being and comfort are of prime importance.

Carers will strive, with continued training, to preserve and maintain the dignity; individuality and privacy of all Service Users within a warm and caring atmosphere, and in so doing will be sensitive to the Service Users ever changing needs. Such needs may be medical/therapeutic (for physical and mental welfare), cultural, psychological, spiritual, emotional and social, and Service Users are encouraged to participate in the development of their individualised Care Plans in which the involvement of family and friends may be appropriate and is greatly valued.

This will also include programmes of activities designed to encourage mental alertness, self-esteem and social interaction with other Service Users and with recognition of the following Core Values of Care, which are fundamental to the philosophy of our Home:
PRIVACY, DIGNITY, RIGHTS, INDEPENDENCE, CHOICE and FULFILMENT.

Name: NOVITA Seniorenzentren
Description:
Im Alter können alltägliche Aufgaben zur Herausforderung werden. Was früher selbstverständlich war, wird zunehmend zur Belastung. Genau hier setzen wir an: Mit moderner Infrastruktur, individueller Unterstützung und kompetenter Pflege schaffen wir ein Umfeld, in dem unsere Bewohner ihr Leben weiterhin so selbstbestimmt wie möglich gestalten können.

Unser Leitspruch „Aus Freude an der Pflege“ ist für uns gelebte Haltung. Die drei Blätter unseres Klees stehen symbolisch für das, was uns ausmacht: Herzlichkeit, Qualität und Verlässlichkeit. Diese Werte prägen unser tägliches Handeln – in der Pflege, in der Betreuung und im Miteinander.

Als Teil der Firmengruppe Pichlmayr, mit Sitz in Eggenfelden im Rottal, profitieren wir von jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung in der stationären Altenpflege. Seit 1995 betreibt die Gruppe mittlerweile 30 Wohn- und Pflegeeinrichtungen in Ober- und Niederbayern – stets mit dem Anspruch, moderne Pflegekonzepte mit menschlicher Nähe zu verbinden.

NOVITA steht für eine neue Form des Wohnens im Alter – für Lebensqualität, Sicherheit und ein Zuhause, das mit den Bedürfnissen wächst.

Neben dem Bundesverband privater Anbieter sozialer Dienste (bpa) gehören der PflegeGesellschaft die fünf Verbände der Freien Wohlfahrtspflege: Arbeiterwohlfahrt, Caritas, Deutsches Rotes Kreuz, Deutscher Paritätischer Wohlfahrtsverband und die Diakonie an. 

Mit rund 450 ambulanten Pflegediensten, die ca. 20.000 Patienten betreuen, und über 450 stationären Pflegeeinrichtungen mit ca. 33.000 Plätzen, vertritt die PflegeGesellschaft das Gros der Pflegeeinrichtungen in Rheinland-Pfalz.
Um eine qualitativ hochwertige pflegerische Betreuung und Versorgung unserer pflegebdürftigen Menschen kümmern sich mehr als 35.000 engagierte Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter.

Description:
1. For most people choosing to give up their home and moving into residential care is a very difficult decision. It is not a decision that should be taken lightly or one that should be rushed, its impact should never be underestimated. 

2. Coming to live in a residential care home with a group of other people does not diminish an individual as a human being in any way! Each person will have their own opinions, character and expectations of life within a care home. It is our job to be aware of these factors and respond to them sensitively.

3. That although residential care can never replace a persons home, choosing to live in a residential home should prove to be an enjoyable and enriching experience. Name: Il Pozzo cooperativa sociale
Description:
La Cooperativa Sociale IL POZZO si propone di formulare risposte concrete ai bisogni di categorie socialmente deboli quali i malati psichici.
Si propone inoltre la ricerca e lo studio di modelli di intervento per la cura ed il trattamento di tutte quelle forme di patologie che creano una disconnessione del soggetto dal suo tessuto sociale.

L’obiettivo principale diventa, quindi, l’esigenza di creare nuove situazioni asilari che non siano emarginanti, in cui il nuovo tipo di impostazione dia la possibilità  alle persone residenti di interagire con la collettività , che consenta al cittadino in crisi di vivere le proprie esperienze mantenendo i legami con il gruppo sociale.

Per questi motivi nell’ambito della strutturazione territoriale dei servizi rivolti ai pazienti psichiatrici, la Cooperativa Sociale IL POZZO ha al momento attive più Strutture Residenziali Psichiatriche per interventi socio sanitari e socio riabilitativi.
A partire dal 2001 sono state avviate sei case, una per la domiciliata , con nove appartamenti.

L’articolazione degli interventi ha accresciuto strutture e risorse che la cooperativa può offrire, mettendo a disposizione dei pazienti tipologie diversificate di intervento, accrescendo così anche la possibile mobilità  dei pazienti nelle diverse case a seconda del grado di autonomia raggiunta.

Name: RSA Villa Aurelia
Description:
R.S.A. Villa Aurelia si propone mediante la condivisione di specifici progetti educativo/assistenziali che si fondano su valori come: accoglienza, rispetto della diversità, impegno, solidarietà e comprensione, il tutto all’interno di un antico palazzo destinato in passato alla Villeggiatura dei Vescovi di Mantova.

Nelle terre mantovane cedute al Vescovo di Mantova da Matilde di Canossa sorge un’antica villa citata la prima volta nel 1672 in un catasto come Palazzo di Villeggiatura Vescovile, occupata per tre secoli da personaggi della chiesa tra cui Papa San Pio X. 

Nel 1974 la struttura diventa casa albergo per anziani gestita dalle Piccole Suore della Sacra Famiglia, per poi nel 2000 diventare R.S.A. Villa Aurelia. 
Un luogo servito per ospiti autosufficienti, non autosufficienti e parzialmente autosufficienti. 

Grazie ad un progetto di restauro del 2007 nato con la volontà di mantenere nella loro autenticità tutti gli elementi che definiscono il prestigio storico ed artistico della Villa, gli ospiti possono soggiornare all’interno di una struttura elegante raffinata, oltre ad usufruire di tutti i servizi che la struttura offre. 
Servizi garantiti dal Direttore, dai Medici e dal Personale Infermieristico che assicurano l'organicità e la corretta armonizzazione dei servizi.

Name: Luna Home Care
Description:
Luna Home care is a type of health care service that provides care and support to people who prefer to live at home instead of a nursing home or hospital. Home care services can be provided by licensed healthcare professionals, such as nurses, therapists, and home health aides, as well as non-medical caregivers. The types of services provided can vary widely depending on the needs of the individual, and may include assistance with activities of daily living, medication management, wound care, physical therapy, and more.

Luna Home care is becoming an increasingly popular option for those who require assistance with daily tasks, as it allows them to remain in the comfort of their own homes while receiving the necessary care and support. It also provides peace of mind to family members who may not be able to provide the level of care needed themselves. With the growing aging population and advancements in technology, home care is expected to continue to grow and evolve to meet the changing needs of individuals and families.

Name: Neuhaus Wohn- und Pflegezentrum Wängi
Description:
Neuhaus – Wohnen und Pflege mit Herz im Grünen 

Im Neuhaus finden unsere Bewohner nicht nur einen Platz zum Wohnen, sondern ein Zuhause voller Wärme, Respekt und Würde. Eingebettet in die ländliche Natur begleiten wir Menschen in ihrem letzten Lebensabschnitt – mit Achtsamkeit, Professionalität und Herzlichkeit.

Unsere Werte sind klar: Respekt, Würde, Toleranz, Humor und Menschlichkeit prägen das tägliche Miteinander. Wir schaffen Raum für Geborgenheit und Lebensqualität – getragen von engagierten Mitarbeitenden, die mit Herz und Kompetenz für unsere Bewohner da sind.

 Gastronomie & Begegnung
Ein besonderer Ort ist unsere Gastronomie: Täglich verwöhnen wir Bewohner wie auch Gäste mit frisch zubereiteten Mahlzeiten. Im Kafi Ziitlos können sich Menschen begegnen – Jung und Alt verbringen Zeit miteinander, tauschen sich aus und fühlen sich willkommen. So entsteht ein lebendiger Treffpunkt, der Gemeinschaft und Wohlbefinden fördert.

 Tierpark & Natur
Unser hauseigener Tierpark lädt zum Verweilen ein und schenkt unseren Bewohnern sowie Besuchern unvergessliche Momente. Mit viel Hingabe und Liebe gepflegte Tiere schaffen Nähe zur Natur, fördern Begegnungen und bringen Lebensfreude in den Alltag.

Das Neuhaus verbindet Tradition und Moderne: Seit über 150 Jahren sind wir fest in der Region verwurzelt und gestalten heute ein zeitgemässes, lebendiges Wohn- und Pflegezentrum, das auf Vertrauen, Nähe und Fürsorge baut.

Neuhaus – ein Zuhause, in dem Menschen Mensch sein dürfen.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: EFSA Quierschied Europäische Fachschule für Pflege
Description:
In Deutschland herrscht ein Mangel an Pflegefachkräften, denn der Anteil der älteren Menschen nimmt immer rascher zu. Zwischen 1999 und 2013 ist die Zahl der pflegebedürftigen Personen auf 2,7 Millionen gestiegen. Bis 2060 könnten 4,7 Millionen Menschen in Deutschland pflegebedürftig sein.

Mitten im Herzen Europas, im saarländischen Quierschied, bietet unsere international ausgerichtete Pflegeschule EFSA sowohl ausländischen als auch deutschen Schülerinnen und Schülern mit einer Ausbildung zur Pflegefachfrau / zum Pflegefachmann (m/w/d) die Chance auf eine fundierte berufliche Perspektive .

Name: Amando Seniorenresidenzen
Description:

Aktuell entstehen in Gladbeck und Oberhausen die ersten beiden Einrichtungen der Amando Seniorenresidenzen, die sowohl stationäre Pflege als auch Kurzzeitpflege anbieten werden. Die tägliche Arbeit bei Amando ist geprägt von einem familiären Pflegeverständnis, das durch Nachhaltigkeit, Innovationsfreude sowie den gezielten Einsatz digitaler Lösungen unterstützt wird. Die Amando-Residenzen richten sich an alle Teile der Bevölkerung und verfolgen den Anspruch, fest im jeweiligen Quartier verankert zu sein und als Pflegeeinrichtung für ihr Umfeld wahrgenommen zu werden.

Den Mitarbeitenden bietet Amando ein wertschätzendes Arbeitsumfeld, in dem Vertrauen, Teamgeist und gegenseitige Unterstützung im Mittelpunkt stehen. Eine offene Unternehmenskultur, kurze Entscheidungswege sowie die Förderung von fachlicher und persönlicher Weiterentwicklung schaffen die Grundlage dafür, dass Pflege mit Herz, Kompetenz und Engagement gelebt werden kann. www.amando-pflege.de

Name: Medical Surgical Nursing Department- TUMS
Description: The Department of Medical Surgical Nursing is one of the oldest educational departments of Nursing and Midwifery faculty, TUMS, which has been active since the beginning of the faculty. After the separation of educational departments, this department is responsible for educating students in courses related to basic and Medical surgical sciences. Our Department is active in teaching three levels: undergraduate, graduate, and doctoral. At the undergraduate level, students are trained and empowered in theoretical, practical, internship, and training courses related to basic sciences, medical surgical, and emergency medicine. In addition, the department's professors cooperate in guiding undergraduate students to obtain a research diploma. At the master's and doctoral levels, in addition to providing courses in accordance with the announced educational program, students' theses are also guided and supervised by the department's professors. This department has 19 faculty members and 9 teaching staff members in the form of official, contractual, and service commitment faculty. Each year, an average of 12 master's students and 2 doctoral students are accepted into this department.

Eines der größten Bedürfnisse von Bewohnern ist eine intensiv erlebte Betreuung. Das ist unser Fokus.

Unser Pflegedienstleistung ist innovativ: Wir verbinden erstmals qualitativ hochwertige Pflege mit Servicestrukturen aus dem Hotelbereich und schaffen durch intelligentes Management mehr Zeit für Pflege.

Inspiriert wird AURISCARE vom Dienstleistungsverständnis der Hotelbranche sowie von modernen Behandlungs-Leitlinien aus dem Bereich integrierter medizinischer Versorgungsformen. Unsere Vision ist es, Qualität und Menschlichkeit mit hochwertigem Wohnambiente zu verbinden und unsere Einrichtungen in lokale Gesundheitsnetzwerke einzubetten.

Wir bauen unsere gesamte Organisation auf effizienten und modernen Verwaltungsstrukturen auf, um ein Mehr an Zeit für die Betreuung unserer Bewohner zu gewinnen. Uns gelingt der Spagat zwischen professioneller Pflege und persönlicher Zuwendung. Wir befriedigen dadurch intensiver die Bedürfnisse der Bewohner, ihrer Angehörigen und die unserer Mitarbeiter.

Mehr Zeit in der Pflege ist unser Leitbild, denn Qualität beginnt mit Zeit. Daran lassen wir uns messen.

Name: Greenwich Woods Rehabilitation & Health Care Center
Description:
Greenwich Woods Rehabilitation and Health Care Center is a 217 bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility located in Greenwich, Connecticut on the border of Rye Brook, New York. We are six miles from downtown White Plains, New York and within minutes from the Westchester County Airport, I-684 and the Hutchinson River/Merritt Parkways.

Greenwich Woods has been serving the Westchester and Fairfield County communities for more than 30 years. We offer a broad range of health care services including Post Acute Care, Short Term Inpatient/Outpatient Rehabilitation and Long Term Skilled Nursing. Greenwich Woods also has a forty-five (45) bed secure community dedicated to supporting those affected by Alzheimer’s disease and other cognitive conditions.

Situated in backcountry Greenwich, our facility is adjacent to the former Gimbel estate, an 80 acre sanctuary managed and preserved by the National Audubon Society of Greenwich. Our diverse landscape and park-like grounds provide a lovely setting for visits with family and friends.

We want you to be confident that you have selected the best facility for your health care needs. When possible, we encourage you to meet our team and tour our facility in advance of a rehab or long term stay. We understand this is not always possible when unexpected illness or injury occurs. You can rest assured that our team is committed to providing you and your loved ones with exceptional health care in a warm and supportive environment.

Our attentive and dedicated caregivers remain available 24/7 to respond to our patients’ daily physical, social, and psychological needs. Our nursing staff is well-equipped to handle residents with a number of complex medical issues. We strive to maintain our residents’ independence and dignity by allowing them to be as self-sufficient as possible. With an engaging, supportive lifestyle and a history of thoughtful care for residents, the Phoenix Center aims to give our residents everything they need to succeed. Our goal is to treat every resident as family. We take our motto very seriously: we are here because we care.

The Phoenix Center helps ease the transition from hospital to home for individuals recuperating from illness or surgery. Whether one needs rehabilitation following a stroke, cardiac incident, or joint replacement, our center is fully equipped to accelerate their recovery process. Our highly trained in-house rehab professionals deliver physical, occupational, and speech therapy seven days a week in conjunction with the necessary emotional support.

Residents describe our caregivers as dedicated, responsive, and genuinely empathetic. Our staff is truly attuned to every patient’s distinct needs and consistently go above and beyond their daily duties. Once a patient returns home, our attentive care does not end. We always follow up to ensure they receive proper care and continually improving.

Our three core values drive everything we do here at Hughes:

1) Tailored Staffing Solutions
HHG offers a range of specialized services to meet the unique needs of each healthcare organization, whether it be long-term care, retirement communities, or private in-home care. Our extensive roster includes RNs, RPNs, PSWs, Resident Safety Aids, among others.

2) Advanced Education and Training
Our leadership team has extensive knowledge and experience in the long-term and home care sectors, ensuring all deployed team members meet or exceed industry training standards. This commitment to quality ensures our clients receive the best possible care.

3) Technology-Driven Efficiencies
We leverage technology to streamline processes and improve service delivery. Our client portal allows real-time access to schedules and reports, and our innovative QR code system provides easily accessible Team Member onboarding documents with a quick camera scan.

Name: Sensorische zorg
Description:
"Stel je voor: je werkt met iemand met stoornissen in prikkelverwerking en merkt dat contact maken steeds moeilijker wordt. Wat als we niet beginnen bij observatie, maar bij alertheid? Wat als we alertheid van het brein gebruiken als sleutel om verbinding te maken, therapie vorm te geven en adviezen praktisch toepasbaar te maken?"

Wij zijn een ergo- en fysiotherapeut, beiden geschoold in Sensorische Informatieverwerking, en hebben de afgelopen jaren ervaren hoe krachtig deze benadering is. Door alertheid van het brein als startpunt te nemen, krijgen we directe feedback, werken interventies sneller en sluiten we écht aan bij de persoon. Het mooie? Je hoeft geen SI-therapeut te zijn om hiermee verschil te maken, maar kennis is wél essentieel. Die kennis willen wij met jullie delen.

Met Sensorische Zorg willen we (zorg)professionals én mantelzorgers handvatten geven om zintuiglijke verwerking en regulatie van alertheid beter te begrijpen. Want iedereen die betrokken is bij de zorg voor mensen met stoornissen in prikkelverwerking zou deze kennis moeten hebben om verbinding te behouden en de persoon te laten beleven in plaats van overleven. Zo benutten we sterke punten, creëren waardevolle momenten en geven mensen de kans om zichzelf te zijn.

Laten we samen zorgen voor meer kwaliteit van leven door sensorische informatieverwerking een plek te geven in zorg.

“Alertheid als sleutel tot verbinding”

Name: EHPAD Résidence Anaïs de Groucy - Périers
Description:
L’Établissement d’Hébergement pour Personnes Âgées Dépendantes (EHPAD) Anaïs de Groucy est un établissement public autonome à caractère médicosocial. 
Crée au XIVème siècle, l'établissement est progressivement passé du secteur sanitaire au secteur médicosocial. Il se place depuis 2008 sous l’autorité conjointe de l’Agence Régionale de Santé (ARS) et du Conseil Départemental de la Manche. La Résidence Anaïs de Groucy dispose de 150 places d’hébergement, de 80 places de SSIAD et de 37 logements de Résidence Autonomie répartis sur son territoire. 
Véritable plateforme d’accompagnement de la Personne Âgée, l’EHPAD déploie ses prestations afin de développer ses outils d’aide au maintien à domicile ; son objectif étant de pouvoir proposer à chaque parcours de vie l’accompagnement le plus adapté, au moment le plus adapté (aussi bien en hébergement qu’au domicile).

Description:

Licensed by the Ohio Department of Health as a 48-suite Assisted Living / 18-suite Memory-Care and 30-suite Skilled Nursing and Long-Term Care facility. Elmwood Assisted Living of Fremont is a member of Assisted Living Federation of America, Ohio Assisted Living Association, Ohio Healthcare Association, and the Chamber of Commerce of Sandusky County.
Elmwood of Fremont is a healthcare and senior living community which offers support with activities of daily living as well as medical monitoring, medication administration, nursing supervision, skilled nursing and rehabilitation services.  Social and recreational programs, fine dining, housekeeping, laundry, and maintenance services are all a part of this exceptional community.  A special neighborhood specifically designed to meet the needs of residents with Alzheimer's disease and other Dementia is also available.

Name: Wishing Tree Homes
Description:
Wishing Tree Homes provides specialist residential care for children with emotional and behavioural difficulties (EBD), creating stable, nurturing environments where young people can feel safe, supported, and ready to thrive.

We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all. Every young person is unique, and so is the care we provide. Through consistent, trauma-informed support and strong, trusting relationships, we help children rebuild confidence, stability, and independence.

Our homes are calm, structured spaces where care is thoughtfully tailored to each child’s emotional and behavioural needs — delivered with patience, understanding, and respect.

We believe the best care comes from people who feel valued and supported themselves. That’s why we invest in our team with high-quality training, clinical input, and a culture of genuine care — so our staff can bring their best to the children who need it most.

At Wishing Tree Homes, success isn’t just about ratings — it’s about real progress, strong relationships, and giving every child the chance to thrive.

Name: Buda Oaks Assisted Living & Memory Care
Description: Buda Oaks is a senior living community just outside of Austin, TX with your needs in mind. From enticing activities with local artists to personalized care on a daily basis, our assisted living and memory care community offers premium comfort, optimum wellness, and a life with style. Residents start their day with a heart-healthy chef-prepared breakfast before focusing on a community art project or group wellness program. New neighbors become friends over adventures to swimming pools, museums, and even bottling house-made wine. You can enjoy a different game, brain-healthy hobby, or locally-sourced meal every day of the week in your new home. All these activities are available for you to choose from, thanks to a supportive team ready to provide assistance with whatever you need. Our specialized caregivers perform everything from medication tracking to mobility assistance to make your life easier. Let us take care of the housekeeping, laundry, and maintenance services to help simplify your life. Memory care is available to Austin area seniors in The Retreat. This purposeful program relieves caretaking duties from families and offers a secure, consistent, and supportive environment. We tailor an individualized level of care to each resident living with Alzheimer’s or another form of dementia. Located in the heart of one of Austin’s fastest-growing suburbs, Buda Oaks lets seniors live the lives they want. Use our scheduled transportation to and from doctors’ appointments, trips to the store, or lunch with friends. We work harder than anyone to create a warm, welcoming, and upbeat place for seniors and families to stay, visit, and have a good time. Your search for Austin area assisted living can end here. Visit us and feel inspired by the vibe of Austin senior living!

We know the search for the right community is often overwhelming — balancing affordability, safety, dignity, and peace of mind. That’s why we walk alongside families, listening first, and then helping them navigate every option available.

From government-supported programs like ALW and CalAIM to luxury independent and assisted living communities, we provide placement services across the full spectrum of senior living. Our role is to ensure each senior — and each family — finds not just a place, but a true home that fits their needs and values.

Name: The Doris Clifford Center
Description:
The Doris Clifford Center TM will support the family of potential residents by providing a customized service of personal and medical care at a COVID-19 approved location that offers the following.

The service packages being offered include but not limited to 
•	secured (using CCTV) 24-hour / 7-day room and board for long term and/or short term stay 
•	a diverse dining program to include 3 meals, 2 snacks, as well as unlimited hot and cold beverages;
•	housekeeping, 
•	laundry service, 
•	social activities, 
•	movement therapy, and 
•	a communications centre / examination room that will provide residents with privacy to communicate with their family virtually. This room will also be used as an examination room when a physician visits a resident. 
•	Personal care services designed to 
o	help residents with their Activities for Daily Living (ADLs) that include grooming (i.e. dressing, hair, nails, and mouth), 
o	bathing, feeding, and toileting etc when requested.
•	Medical care services that includes but not limited to 
o	medication management and administration, 
o	observation for any changes in behavior or health that are reported to the medical staff. 
o	ongoing medical monitoring of vital signs and other health conditions including wound care and catheterization.
o	Our residents will also have access to medical professional such as medical doctors (on call at their cost) and a registered nurse.

The property will also have a high degree of self-sustenance given the immediate installation of reserve water tanks and 2 Generators to ensure uninterrupted comfort of our residents. 

Services will be added as the needs arise and are available.

Name: Stoddard Baptist Nursing Home
Description:
Our mission is to form and sustain safe, viable, and caring communities for those in need
Stoddard Baptist Nursing Home enjoys a rich legacy of commitment to caring for its residents and their families. Since opening our doors in 1902, we’ve helped thousands of people meet the challenges of aging with grace and dignity, allowing them to continue leading lives of purpose and joy.

The Stoddard Baptist Home opened its doors more than a century ago, in 1902. Originally, it was a retirement home for Baptist ministers and their wives or their widows. The first residents were eight elders who were seeking a place of comfort and security.

Although we’ve expanded our mission, Stoddard Baptist Nursing Home remains dedicated to providing elders with a safe and secure place to call home. While the Stoddard Baptist has grown to include other healthcare communities, Stoddard Baptist Nursing Home remains the flagship of the Stoddard Baptist organization.
Today, we’re a nursing and medical care facility caring for hundreds of Washington-area seniors each year. Our mission has always been to serve those in need with compassion, dignity, and grace.

Name: De Huiskamer van Enkhuizen
Description:
Met kleinschalige, belevenis gerichte dagbesteding en zorg leveren we een belangrijke bijdrage aan het langer zelfstandig blijven wonen van onze cliënten. Daarnaast bieden wij thuiszorg, huishoudelijke ondersteuning en individuele begeleiding. Wij richten ons op kwetsbare cliënten vanaf 45 jaar. Onze werkwijze wordt gekenmerkt door een persoonlijke benadering, waarbij de behoefte van de cliënt centraal staat.  

Doormiddel van meerdere initiatieven, zorgen wij ervoor dat de 45+’er met lichamelijke klachten, eenzaamheid klachten of beginnende dementie zich thuis voelt. 

Kleinschalig wonen in Medemblik 
Wonen in het Bagijnhof, hier openen wij een samenwoonlocatie speciaal voor mensen vanaf 45 jaar, die eenzaamheid klachten, dementie of psychische klachten ervaren. In de samenwoonlocatie wonen de bewoners zelfstandig, maar kunnen ze elkaar ook helpen waar nodig. En er is 7 dagen per week een zorgmedewerker aanwezig. Afhankelijk van de behoefte van de cliënt is nachtzorg mogelijk. In het pand is ook een ontmoetingsruimte, waar de dagbesteding plaatsvindt. Zo komt wonen, dagbesteding en samenzijn bij elkaar.  
 
Huiskamer van Enkhuizen en Medemblik 
Bij onze locaties in Enkhuizen en Medemblik zijn mensen met een zorgvraag 6 dagen per week welkom. Hier vinden ze een plek om samen te zijn met anderen, zich nuttig te maken met alledaagse taken of creatief bezig te zijn. Er is voor iedereen iets te doen. We hebben activiteiten op het gebied van sport, spel en creatief. In onze winkels in Medemblik en Enkhuizen verkopen onze cliënten veel producten die zij zelf hebben gemaakt.  
 
Restaurant De Kanjerkamer 
De Kanjerkamer is niet zomaar een restaurant, hier werken de kanjers van de Huiskamer van Enkhuizen en Medemblik. Hier is iedereen welkom voor koffie of thee met huisgemaakt gebak of een heerlijke lunch bereidt met dagverse producten. Daarnaast maken onze kanjers een heerlijke high tea of een dagelijks wisselende daghap.

Name: Pflegeteam Nordwind
Description:
Die Gründung des Pflegeteams Nordwind erfolgte aus der Idee, die Pflege und Betreuung schwerstkranker Menschen in einen neuen, humaneren Fokus zu rücken und ihnen ein weitgehend autonomes Leben zu ermöglichen. Nach reiflicher Überlegung und einer ausführlichen Phase der Konzeptionierung wagten die beiden Geschäftsführer Lars Wallis und Stefan Wäcken, die beide über eine fundierte Fachausbildung und sehr viel Erfahrung in der ambulanten Pflege sowie der außerklinischen Intensivpflege verfügen, schließlich im Oktober 2015 den Schritt in die Selbstständigkeit.

Schon bald wurden im gesamten Raum Ostfriesland Patienten von Fachkräften auf höchstem Niveau Zuhause versorgt.

2018 kam dann die ambulante Alten- und Krankenpflege in der Region dazu. Mit viel Herzblut und Engagement kümmern sich Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter um die Klienten.

2020 wurden 2 Seniorenwohngemeinschaften in Upgant-Schott übernommen.
Die Häuser werden „Haus Nordwind“ und „Haus Düne“ getauft.

Our Mission

Whether it's short-term respite care, long-term assistance, or specialized care for individuals with unique medical conditions, we are dedicated to delivering services that promote safety, well-being, and independence.

Commitment to Quality

Vijf jongvolwassenen die samen in één pand wonen. Met dit initiatief is Zorgstichting Cocon in 2007 aan de slag gegaan. Name: TEF Social Care Services Ltd
Description:
We specialise in providing exceptional care for individuals. We understand that each person has a unique set of needs and preferences, which is why our dedicated team of caregivers is committed to delivering personalised support. From assistance with daily activities to creating a warm and nurturing environment, we prioritise the well-being and comfort of our patients.
Our agency specialises in recruiting compassionate and qualified care workers who possess a genuine passion for enhancing the quality of life for those in need. With a deep understanding of the unique challenges faced by individuals requiring care, we strive to connect the right care professionals with the right care settings.

Our mission is to bridge the gap between care facilities and proficient care workers who not only meet the necessary qualifications but also embody the empathy and dedication required in the field of social care. We believe that every person deserves to receive care that is not only professional but also delivered with a warm and empathetic touch.

At TEF Social Care Services Ltd, we take pride in our rigorous recruitment process, ensuring that each care worker we recommend is thoroughly vetted, trained, and aligned with our values. We understand the importance of a cohesive care team, and thus, we focus on creating partnerships that are built on trust, communication, and mutual respect.

We are dedicated to supporting nursing homes and local authorities in their pursuit of providing the best possible care to their residents. By carefully selecting and placing skilled care workers, we contribute to the overall well-being and comfort of individuals in our care.

As an agency, we are committed to continuous improvement and staying updated with the latest advancements in the field of social care. This enables us to provide not only the best care workforce but also insights and solutions that enhance the overall care environment.

TEF Social Care Services Ltd invites you to join us

Name: MORAR LODGE NURSING HOME LIMITED
Description:
Morar Lodge Nursing Home is an independent care facility nestled in the tranquil and charming town of Helensburgh. Positioned on the north coast of the River Clyde, merely 8 miles west of Dumbarton along the A814, and approximately 24 miles northwest of Glasgow, Morar Lodge enjoys a prime location offering unique advantages. The property overlooks the Clyde Estuary and the mountains beyond, providing residents with breathtaking views that contribute to the serene and picturesque ambiance of the surroundings.
Our registration with the Care Inspectorate Scotland (CI) allows us to offer care services for a maximum of 33 elderly residents. Our facility comprises 31 single bedrooms, with 19 featuring ensuite facilities. Additionally, we provide spacious shared rooms that can be occupied by a spouse, partner, or preferred sibling. We welcome residents seeking Nursing and Dementia care, Palliative care, Self-funded residential or dementia care, Respite care, and End of life care.

Name: Serenity View Assisted Living and Memory Care
Description:
Serenity View is a physician-led, integrative assisted living and memory care community located on five peaceful acres in Fort Worth/Aledo, Texas. We provide private rooms, 24/7 caregiver support, medication management, gourmet meals, and a whole-person approach to care.
At Serenity View Assisted Living & Memory Care, we are more than a care facility, we are a community built on love, dignity, and purpose. Our guiding phrase, “Love at All Times,” is not just a motto. It is the foundation of how we live, serve, and care.
Personal Care
Our residents are our family. We will go above and beyond to ensure their comfort. You can trust that we will always have their best interest at heart.
Continuous Support
Our residents get the care they need 24/7, 365 days a year. Four Team members are present at all times. We learn about your family so you can rely on us to love them as you would.
Access
We prioritize seamless access for families where loved ones can connect, engage, and create cherished moments together. We always communicate so you are aware of everything happening with your family. Our home has a gated entrance with safety and security as a priority.
Sustenance
Our residents indulge in exceptional sustenance catered to their tastes, expertly crafted by our dedicated personal chef. Our Team makes sure that meals are a family event, no one eats alone and our table is full of joy and love and community.
Physician Led
Our team is led by our Physician owner and ensures a holistic approach to resident health and happiness. Dr Tas is dedicated to ensuring quality of life in all of her new family members.
Form and Function
Spanning 12,500 square feet across 5 acres, meticulously crafted and purpose built to blend accessibility and stunning aesthetics, we offer not just a home, but an unparalleled haven where beauty meets functionality. Our great rooms, garden room, library, private bed and baths, all create special place worthy of being a forever home.
