Name: Altersheim Mon Soleil
Description:
Das Altersheim Mon Soleil im Berner Länggassquartier steht für familiäres und individuelles Wohnen im Alter. Es wird als Stiftung geführt. 

Im Stadthaus mit persönlich eingerichteten Einzelzimmern und grossem Garten leben 16 Bewohner*innen. 15 Zimmer sind für Langzeitaufenthalte vorgesehen. Hier leben Menschen, die dauerhaft stationäre Pflege benötigen. Darunter sind auch Menschen mit Demenz. Ein Zimmer ist Personen vorbehalten, die nach einem Spitalaufenthalt vorübergehend auf stationäre Pflege angewiesen sind, bei uns Ferien machen oder ihre Angehörigen entlasten möchten. 

Unser Pflegeverständnis
Das pflegerische Handeln ist darauf ausgerichtet, die Bewohner*innen ganzheitlich wahrzunehmen und sie einfühlsam und bedürfnisorientiert zu pflegen und zu begleiten. Das Altersheim Mon Soleil orientiert sich bei seiner Arbeit an der Pflegedefinition des International Council of Nurses, den ethischen Grundsätzen des Schweizer Berufsverbands der Pflegefachfrauen und Pflegefachmänner SBK und einem humanistischen Menschenbild. Unser Ziel ist es, den Bewohner*innen in einem Umfeld, das ihnen Sicherheit und Geborgenheit bietet, bis zu ihrem Tod eine ganzheitliche Pflege zu bieten. 

Was uns als Arbeitgeberin auszeichnet
Wir pflegen ein wertschätzendes Arbeitsklima und fördern unsere Mitarbeitenden in der beruflichen und persönlichen Weiterentwicklung. Deshalb bieten wir ihnen regelmässig individuelle interne und externe Weiterbildungen. Bei Letzteren beteiligen wir uns an den Kosten oder übernehmen sie ganz. Die Entlöhnung ist funktions- und leistungsgerecht und richtet sich nach der kantonalen Gehaltstabelle. Ein Plus bei uns ist die überdurchschnittliche Pensionskassenlösung. 

Wir setzen uns für eine gute Work-Life-Balance ein und bieten 
•	5 Wochen Ferien bis 54 Jahre
•	6 Wochen Ferien ab 55 Jahre
•	40-Stunden-Woche
•	Jahresarbeitszeit

Stiftung Altersheim Mon Soleil
Betriebsleitung: Sibylla Wetli
Zähringerstrasse 3
3012 Bern
info@altersheim-monsoleil.ch
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Truly Timeless Care
Description:
Truly Timeless Care was established to provide a quality service to children and young people who have experienced trauma, instability and/or inconsistent care. Both directors (Glennis Wood and Simone Casey) are qualified Social Workers, with front line experience in social care. This has included working with children subject to child protection, children in need, children in care and children with disabilities. Both Glennis and Simone have had their own personal journey and experiences that led them to their careers in Social Work. This underpins their passion and commitment to making a difference to children and evidencing that despite your experience, the possibilities are endless. Our vision is not solely about short term intervention, it is to provide a long-term specialist provision that supports children and young people throughout childhood and beyond, if appropriate. Throughout our own journeys, we have recognised the challenges that children face. We recognise that it is a privilege for children to allow us to support them and to become aware of their difficult journey.

“Relationships that have hurt, need relationships to heal’ is an ethos that underpins our focus. We recognise that children who have experienced trauma, need unconditional care and consistent, safe and trusting relationships to enable them to repair the harm they have experienced. We aim to provide a safe, nurturing home environment, and build upon the strengths of any child. We believe in every child, believe that everyone is equally valuable and that everyone has the ability to change. The aim of the service is to help children and young people to reside, grow and develop 
in a safe and caring environment supported by qualified, dedicated and suitably trained staff who share our vision and values.  Our children and young people will receive individual care packages in line with their assessed needs, to ensure that their future potential is maximised and prepares them for adulthood.

Name: Çınar Huzurevi
Description: Ankara'da bulunan Özel Çınar Huzurevi ve Yaşlı Bakım Merkezi, yaşlıların bakımı ve sağlık ihtiyaçlarının karşılanması amacıyla hizmet vermektedir. Modern tesisleri, deneyimli personeli ve yüksek standartlarda sağlık hizmetleriyle dikkat çeken huzurevi, yaşlıların günlük yaşamlarına uygun olarak tasarlanmış konforlu odalar sunmaktadır. Ayrıca, yaşlıların psikolojik ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için sosyal aktiviteler, grup terapileri ve danışmanlık hizmetleri de sunulmaktadır. Özel Çınar Huzurevi ve Yaşlı Bakım Merkezi, konum olarak Çankaya ilçesine bağlı Mustafa Kemal Mahallesi'nde yer almaktadır. Huzurevinde, yaşlıların her türlü sağlık ihtiyacına cevap veren deneyimli bir sağlık ekibi tarafından 24 saat kesintisiz hizmet sunulmaktadır. Huzurevinde ayrıca yaşlıların beslenme ihtiyaçlarına da özen gösterilmekte ve diyetisyen tarafından hazırlanan özel menüler sunulmaktadır. Yaşlıların fiziksel ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için fizyoterapi ve rehabilitasyon hizmetleri de verilmektedir. Özel Çınar Huzurevi ve Yaşlı Bakım Merkezi, yaşlıların bakım, sağlık ve psikolojik ihtiyaçlarının karşılandığı güvenli, konforlu ve profesyonel bir ortam sunmaktadır.

Built on a foundation of dignity and personal growth, our person-centred approach encourages residents to:

 - Live confidently: fostering independence through daily living skills, community engagement, and meaningful relationships 

 - Thrive with care: our trained and compassionate staff offer around-the-clock assistance and emotional support, ensuring both comfort and safety ,

 - Connect with community: we collaborate with families, healthcare professionals, and local networks to create individualized support plans that evolve with each person 

Bluebell Supported Living is dedicated to helping residents make a successful transition from dependence to a rich, independent lifestyle.

Description:
DevonHouse Senior Living is more than just a senior living community – it’s a trusted partner in providing exceptional care and a warm, welcoming environment for seniors and their families. Located in the heart of the Lehigh Valley, near Allentown, Pennsylvania, DevonHouse is a beacon of excellence in personal care, memory care, and respite care services.

At DevonHouse, we understand the profound importance of choosing the right care setting for your loved one. Our team is dedicated to ensuring that every resident receives compassionate, individualized attention tailored to their unique needs and preferences. With a reputation built on trust and a commitment to quality, families throughout the Lehigh Valley turn to DevonHouse Senior Living when they seek outstanding care for their loved ones.

Personal Care Services

Our personal care program is designed to empower seniors to maintain their independence while offering the support they need to thrive. From assistance with daily activities such as bathing, dressing, and medication management to providing nutritious meals and engaging activities, we focus on promoting overall well-being and fostering a sense of purpose and joy. Each resident’s care plan is carefully crafted with their input, ensuring a holistic approach that respects their individuality.

Specialized Memory Care

For seniors living with Alzheimer’s disease or other forms of dementia, DevonHouse offers a secure and nurturing memory care environment. Our specialized programs are designed to enhance cognitive function, reduce stress, and provide meaningful engagement. Trained caregivers provide 24/7 support, ensuring residents are safe, comfortable, and treated with the utmost dignity. Families can find peace of mind knowing their loved ones are surrounded by skilled professionals who truly understand their unique challenges and needs.

Respite Care

We know that caregiving can be both rewarding and challenging. That’s why DevonHouse offers respite care

Name: JMR - Segurança e Facilites
Description:
JMR – Segurança e Facilities

Desde 2007, a JMR se destaca no mercado pela excelência na prestação de serviços terceirizados com foco em segurança, organização e eficiência. Nossa atuação abrange condomínios residenciais e industriais, indústrias e comércios de diferentes portes, sempre com soluções personalizadas para cada necessidade.

Contamos com uma equipe altamente capacitada e em constante treinamento, o que garante a padronização, qualidade e agilidade em todos os serviços prestados. Atuamos com:

 Portaria e Controle de Acesso – Profissionais treinados e rotinas desenvolvidas conforme a realidade de cada local.
 Limpeza e Conservação – Equipamentos modernos, produtos adequados e cronogramas personalizados.
 Zeladoria e Manutenção Geral – Manutenções preventivas e pequenos reparos com supervisão qualificada.
 Jardinagem – Conservação de áreas verdes com atenção ao projeto paisagístico original.
 Bombeiro Civil – Prevenção de incêndios, primeiros socorros e inspeção de equipamentos.
 Supervisão Técnica e Treinamento Contínuo – Equipes operacionais acompanhadas 24h por supervisores preparados.

A credibilidade conquistada ao longo dos anos resultou em parcerias duradouras com clientes, fornecedores e colaboradores. Esse sucesso nos permitiu expandir e criar a Virtuale – Portaria Virtual e Sistemas de Segurança, empresa do GRUPO JMR focada em tecnologia para proteção patrimonial.

Na JMR, sua tranquilidade é o nosso compromisso.

Unsere unterschiedlichen Pflege- und Betreuungsangebote werden auf die individuellen Bedürfnisse der Senioren und ihrer Angehörigen abgestimmt. So ist es in unseren Seniorenwohnungen beispielsweise möglich, weiterhin den eigenen Haushalt zu führen, während im Betreuten Wohnen umfassende Unterstützungsangebote in Anspruch genommen werden können. Für einen Zeitraum von maximal vier Wochen kann zudem die Kurzzeitpflege zur Entlastung von Angehörigen pflegebedürftiger Menschen genutzt werden.

Auch beratend stehen wir pflegebedürftigen Senioren und deren Angehörigen zur Seite. Wenn es beispielsweise um Antragsstellungen für mögliche finanzielle Unterstützungen oder die Entlassung aus dem Krankenhaus in das häusliche Umfeld geht, bieten wir kompetente Unterstützung. 

Ebenso sind wir pflegenden Angehörigen in der ambulanten Versorgung behilflich, z. B. bei der Hilfsmittelversorgung, der Vermittlung von Essen auf Rädern und Pflegediensten, dem Hausnotruf, Selbsthilfegruppen und anderen regionalen Angeboten.

Name: Bay Harbor Senior Living
Description:
With a legacy rooted in innovation and compassion, Bay Harbor Senior Living brings over three decades of experience in transforming senior care communities. Our journey began in 1990 as ElderHaus, a pioneering provider of specialized Alzheimer’s care, which rapidly expanded to 27 facilities by 1997. Following a successful merger with national provider Encore Senior Living—then closely affiliated with Classic Residence by Hyatt—our leadership continued to build on a track record of excellence.

In 2001, Harbor House was founded with a mission to revitalize struggling communities. By enhancing memory care services and introducing higher-acuity assisted living programs, Harbor House successfully turned around three underperforming facilities, achieving 100% occupancy and financial stability. This model scaled to 29 locations and 52 licenses across Wisconsin through strategic acquisitions and repositioning.

Established in 2014, Bay Harbor Senior Living carries forward this legacy as a trusted turnaround specialist. We focus on managing underperforming properties, identifying underserved markets for development, and elevating standards of care—especially in Alzheimer’s and dementia services.

Our reputation is built on strong industry relationships, flexible partnership models, financial acumen, and a relentless commitment to operational excellence.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Viertel4
Description:
Pflege & Wohnen neu definiert.
Eine neue Wohnform als Alternative zum Pflegeheim.
Wir vereinen Wohnen, Pflege & Tagespflege unter einem Dach.

Als innovatives und zukunftsorientiertes Wohn- und Pflegemodell in Kooperation mit dem Servicehaus Sonnenhalde kombiniert das Viertel4 das Wesentliche für Menschen mit Pflegebedarf. Für Kunden ab Pflegegrad 2 vereint es Wohnen, Pflege, Versorgung, Service und Aktivität unter einem Dach.
Die meisten Menschen wünschen sich, in ihrer Wohnung alt zu werden. Im Viertel4 leben Menschen mit allem persönlichem Komfort so individuell und selbstbestimmt wie sie möchten in den eigenen vier Wänden. Hier ist reichlich Raum für Eigenheiten, Wünsche und Bedürfnisse, für Freunde und Familie. Und zwar so selbstverständlich und alltäglich, wie es immer schon war.
Und dennoch mit einigen Vorzügen: Wenn unsere Bewohner Unterstützung brauchen, ist sie da. Bedürfnisgenau, absolut fürsorglich, verlässlich, vorausschauend und kurzfristig. Auch hierfür braucht es eine neue Denkweise. Das Service- und Pflegepersonal schaut nicht nur nach den Defiziten der Bewohner, sondern danach, was der einzelne Mensch noch kann und will:

Der eine könnte noch selbst kochen, gönnt sich aber die Freude, sich an den gedeckten Tisch zu setzen. Während der andere genau darauf angewiesen ist. Und wieder ein anderer kocht vielleicht von Herzen gerne selbst und lädt sich Gäste zum Essen ein. Anders als im Pflegeheim wählen Sie sich bei uns genau die Bausteine aus, die Sie wollen und brauchen.

Unser Ziel ist es jedoch immer, unsere Bewohner dabei zu unterstützen, so lange wie möglich selbständig und fit zu bleiben. Dadurch vermeiden wir vorzeitige Alterung und Abhängigkeit und fördern die Selbstständigkeit.

Denn wir sind überzeugt: Gesundheitsförderung und Prävention machen bis zum Lebensende Sinn.

Unser Impressum:
https://viertel-4.de/impressum/

Name: Thuiszorg Totaal
Description:
Met meer dan 70 betrokken Zorgverleners zetten wij dagelijks de wens van klant centraal. Het ondersteunen van senioren in het dagelijks leven met persoonlijke verzorging en begeleiding. Altijd in eigen regie en op een vast tijdstip door bekende medewerkers van Thuiszorg Totaal.

Hierbij past een organisatie die doelgericht te werk gaat en zich zo weinig mogelijk bezighoudt met overbodige rompslomp. 
Wij houden hierbij altijd voor ogen: hoe zouden wij zelf ondersteuning willen krijgen als wij in een afhankelijke situatie komen? 
Onze medewerkers komen bij mensen in hun persoonlijke (thuis)omgeving. U als klant bepaalt wie u over de vloer wilt hebben, op welke tijdstippen, hoe lang en welke activiteiten worden uitgevoerd. Onze medewerkers zijn bij u te gast en daar gedragen zij zich naar. 
Wij zorgen ervoor dat de medewerkers de juiste opleiding en ervaring hebben om te kunnen voldoen aan uw behoeften en wensen. Wezenlijk is dat zij plezier beleven aan de dienstverlening. 
In vergelijking met traditionele thuiszorgorganisaties kunnen we tot 40% meer tijd leveren in hetzelfde budget.

Wenn aber ein Mensch hilfe- oder pflegebedürftig wird, ist oftmals ein Platz im Alten- oder Pflegeheim die einzige vermeintliche Alternative. Hier verbringen unsere Liebsten dann häufig ihren Lebensabend auf engstem Raum für teures Geld. Daher haben wir es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, älteren Leuten den Gang in ein Heim zu ersparen und ein sicheres und würdevolles Leben in den eigenen vier Wänden zu ermöglichen.

Name: Inspiring Futures Social Care Consultancy
Description:
I bring over a decade of experience in children’s residential care, having worked as a Registered Manager for both Local Authority and private organisations. Throughout my career, I have been committed to creating safe, nurturing environments where young people feel supported, valued, and empowered to achieve their potential. I am proud of the positive impact I have had on the lives of many children and young people, guiding them through challenging circumstances and helping them to build brighter futures.

As a Regulation 44 Visitor, I use this knowledge and experience to support children’s homes in delivering the highest standards of care. I work closely with managers and staff teams to identify strengths, address areas for improvement, and ensure compliance with regulations, while always keeping the needs of young people at the centre. I also specialise in supporting managers through the supervision process, helping them to grow in confidence and effectiveness as leaders. Alongside this, I provide consultancy and advice for those opening new children’s homes, offering practical guidance on registration, compliance, and operational practice.

My passion lies in driving positive change across the sector, strengthening leadership, and ensuring that every home I work with is equipped to deliver safe, consistent, and child-centred care. Ultimately, my goal is to continue improving outcomes and making a lasting difference in the lives of children and young people.

For more information please contact james@inspiringfuturesscc.co.uk

Name: EHPAD Les Héliantines
Description:
Découvrez Les Résidences des Héliantines : Un Cadre de Vie Idéal pour Nos Aînés ! 

Situées au cœur de 10 charmantes communes du Pas-de-Calais, Les Résidences des Héliantines offrent un cadre de vie paisible et accueillant pour nos aînés .
Nos établissements se trouvent à Noyelles les Vermelles, Billy Berclau, Cambrin, Douvrin, Haisnes, Hulluch, Labourse, La Couture, Sailly Labourse et Violaines, toutes des localités proches les unes des autres et facilement accessibles .

Nos résidences bénéficient d’un environnement dynamique et riche en services . À proximité immédiate, vous trouverez un large choix de commerces et de services pour répondre à tous vos besoins quotidiens. De plus, la vie associative est particulièrement active dans ces communes , créant un véritable lien social pour nos résidents, notamment pour les échanges intergénérationnels .

Nous proposons également des services adaptés à tous les besoins. Une Unité de Vie Alzheimer (UVA)  est à disposition pour accueillir et accompagner les résidents atteints de troubles cognitifs, en leur offrant un cadre sécurisé et bienveillant.
De plus, nous offrons la possibilité de séjours temporaires  pour ceux qui souhaitent découvrir notre établissement ou pour répondre à des besoins ponctuels tels que le repos des aidants ou encore pour maintenir le lien social .

Rejoignez Les Résidences des Héliantines et profitez d’un cadre de vie serein et épanouissant, au sein de villages où il fait bon vivre , tout en restant proche de votre entourage et de vos habitudes .
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Name: Hestia Homes for Children
Description:
Hestia Homes for Children provide stimulating environments for our children and young people.  It is a place where they can achieve, build positive relationships, and most importantly call it a home, their home.  We wish to inspire feelings of happiness and optimism, to create value and to make a difference.

Offre i confort e gli agi di una struttura moderna all’interno di una splendida villa settecentesca situata a Peveragno, (in frazione Montefallonio, a pochi chilometri da Cuneo) ristrutturata e accreditata dalla Regione Piemonte immersa in 35.000 mq di terreno esposti a mezzogiorno che di stagione in stagione variano in gradazioni di colori.
Trattasi di una struttura complessa ad alta sanitizzazione in grado di ospitare fino a 116 utenti con variabili compromissioni di autonomia che ne facciano regolare richiesta ed in particolare offre la possibilità di accogliere fino a 20 ospiti/pazienti affetti da sclerosi multipla in ricovero di sollievo al fine di consentire il recupero ed il potenziamento delle capacità residue attraverso riabilitazione ed assistenza in percorsi personalizzati.
L’obiettivo primario di La Villa Fiorita è fornire un servizio in grado di soddisfare le esigenze esplicite ed implicite degli ospiti dando risposte alle loro necessità, misurandosi continuamente con i loro reali bisogni, in modo da offrire un notevole sollievo anche ai familiari, conferendo loro la certezza che i propri cari sono costantemente seguiti nella struttura, inserita nella rete territoriale, sempre più in grado di fornire servizi qualificati in appoggio o ad integrazione delle strutture pubbliche competenti.
La Struttura, suddivisa in nuclei composti da stanze singole e doppie organizzate secondo quanto previsto dalla Deliberazione della Giunta Regionale 30 luglio 2012 n. 45-4248 e s.m., pone molta attenzione alla profilazione degli ospiti ed alla riabilitazione necessaria al fine di gestire, contrastare o rallentare i possibili disturbi arrecati da malattie o comunque mantenere il più alto grado di autonomia possibile.

Name: A.P.S.P. "Margherita Grazioli"

Nel 1881 il Comune di Povo (soppresso nel Comune di Trento) ricevette dalla signora Margherita Grazioli la donazione, con vincolo testamentario, di un'antica villa con podere annesso per "un ospitale a favore dei poveri di detta comunità".
Solo 10 anni più tardi, il 22 novembre 1891, venne inaugurato l'"Ospitale M. Grazioli".
Vennero così gettate le solide basi di quella che sarebbe diventata, un secolo più tardi, una delle maggiori case di riposo del Trentino, portando la propria capacità ricettiva dagli originali 10 posti letto agli attuali 185.
Nel 1971 l'originaria denominazione di "Ospitale" divenne "Casa di Riposo Margherita Grazioli" (ex Istituzione di Pubblica Assistenza e Beneficenza - I.P.A.B.).
A seguito della Legge Regionale n. 7/2005, la struttura venne denominata "Azienda Pubblica di Servizi alla Persona Margherita Grazioli".
L'Azienda gestisce e offre servizi residenziali, semi-residenziali, a domicilio e per il territorio rivolti agli anziani.

Name: Alters- und Pflegeheim Rosengarten
Description:
Wir bietet 20 Pflegebetten an. Durch die überschaubare Grösse beschreiben wir den Alltag vor allem als familiär. Gerne verbringen unsere Bewohnerinnen, Bewohner und unsere Feriengäste Zeit in unseren gemütlichen Aufenthaltsräumen und natürlich in unserem grossen und sonnigen Garten, nach dem das ganze Heim benannt ist. Die Mahlzeiten stammen aus unserer guten und vielseitigen Küche. Das gutgenutzte Angebot von Manicure und Pedicure bieten wir im Haus an.
Da seit Januar 2021 die betriebliche Führung dem Heimleiter des Alters- und Pflegeheims Risi, Georg Raguth, übertragen worden ist, können wir durch die gute Zusammenarbeit mit dem Risi ein vielfältiges Angebot an Aktivierungs- und Beschäftigungsaktivitäten sowie Veranstaltungen als Alltagsabwechslung anbieten.
Viele können ein Haus einrichten; aber nur wenige verstehen die Kunst ein Zuhause zu kreieren. Dieses Motto begleitet uns in allen Bereichen: Ob unsere Bewohner für einen Kurz- oder Langaufenthalt einziehen, einen Ferienplatz, ganzheitliche Pflege oder Palliativpflege benötigen, wir richten unsere Pflege und Betreuung nach den Bedürfnissen, den Interessen und den Gewohnheiten unserer Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner und gestalten den Lebensalltag mit Ihnen gemeinsam. 
Selbstbestimmung ist Lebensqualität und Lebensqualität steht in engem Zusammenhang mit Selbstbestimmung. Uns ist es wichtig, den Alltag nach den Interessen und Gewohnheiten unserer Bewohnerinnen und Bewohnern zu gestalten. 
Wofür steht das „WIR“? Einen Teil des WIR sind die Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner, der andere Teil vom WIR steht das Team der Mitarbeiter. Ein guter Teamgeist entsteht, wenn alle Mitarbeiter die gleiche Leidenschaft für das Teilen, für was sie täglich arbeiten. Dieser Teamgeist schweisst unser Team zusammen und unser gemeinsames Ziel ist es, für alle unsere Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner ein Zuhause zu kreieren.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

Kompaktien, omilla keittomahdollisuuksilla varustettujen asuntojen lisäksi taloihin tulee myös yhteinen aula sekä kokoontumistila, jotka tarjoavat tilavan mahdollisuuden asukkaiden ja vieraiden yhteisiin hetkiin. Viihtyisä pihapiiri tarjoaa virikkeellistä sisältöä päivään ja mahdollisuuden nauttia yhteisestä ajasta tai harrastaa vaikkapa puutarhan parissa.

Etsimme aktiivisesti uusia tontteja ympäri Suomen, jotta voimme tarjota yhä useammalle ikärikkaalle yhteisöllisen ja turvallisen kodin.

Name: Rosewood Home Kenya
Description:
About Rosewood Retirement Home 
To place a loved one in a care home is one of the hardest decisions faced by children and the decision does not come without an emotional cost to the entire family 
Heart searching goes with the territory. Torment of guilt and feelings of “dumping” or failing a parent will haunt those left to make the decision. When one things deeper and realizes that their loved one will receive good care – this is a kind and generous act  
Rosewood Retirement Home is the kind of home that provides an intimate, homelike setting, along with individualized care and attention, respect, and dignity as our loved ones age   
. 
Rosewood is located two kilometres from Galleria Shopping Mall. It’s a kilometre in to Kuwinda Road, off Karen Road. Rosewood has grown from 6 to 16 suites and the homes sit in a gated community.. 
Pauline personally trains her carers. The training program is three month  intense program, six of which is spent in hospital . The carers can be anyone – graduates, house helps or volunteers.
Apart from resident and in-home care, Rosewood also has a Senior’s Day Monday through Friday. “Senior’s Day is a day for the elderly to socialize with their peers,” says Pauline. “They will engage in fun activities designed to ease their physical, emotional and social challenges. It’s open to anyone.” And there’s also the short stay – bring your loved one in when you go on vacation. 
There is no criterion for our elderly to live at Rosewood, Anyone can be part of the Rosewood Retirement home family.”

Name: BrainTrainerPlus AU
Description:
The BrainTrainerPlus is a recreative portal designed to stimulate cognitive capabilities and memories for the aged through the power of games. It was initially created in the Netherlands by a concerned son for his Mother who had recently been placed into an aged care facility. He didn’t want her to be bored, he wanted her to remember what she was slowly forgetting, and he wanted something they could play together during his visits.

The BrainTrainerPlus was created based on theories citing benefits of play therapy for people with Dementia, Alzheimers, Depression, and just lack of intellectual stimulus.

It has established itself as a beneficial tool for both clients and support workers. Inducing interaction, cognitive action and entertainment. The BrainTrainerPlus primarily aims to dust off the blanket of boredom that can persist in aged care facilities while enabling and entertaining the minds of the clients.

Name: Le Platon
Description:
A Tradition of Caring
For over a century, Le Platon has been a cornerstone of compassionate care in Guernsey, dedicated to providing exceptional comfort and support to our residents. Founded in 1914 by Miss Edith Renouf (MBE), who generously donated her personal wealth to the home, Le Platon was established as a haven for those in need of dedicated and empathetic care.

Located in the Clifton area of St Peter Port, our home offers breathtaking views of St Peter Port, its harbour, Castle Cornet, and the nearby islands of Herm and Sark. As the island’s oldest Care Home, we continue to uphold our founding principles, offering a safe and supportive environment for the elderly, regardless of faith.

Our recent expansion underscores our commitment to evolving with the needs of our community, now featuring 50 bedrooms, including 37 specialised dementia care beds. This growth ensures that we can deliver the highest level of care to those who need it most.

Le Platon operates as a registered Guernsey charity, sustained through generous fundraising and the dedication of our voluntary Board of Directors, who give their time freely. We remain steadfast in our mission to provide unparalleled care and continue to invest in our community, building on a rich tradition of service and support.

Name: ORAH Care Ltd
Description:
ORAH Care Ltd is a therapeutic children’s residential service provider based in Knowsley, specialising in delivering trauma-informed care for children and young people.

We provide a safe, nurturing, and structured environment that promotes healing, autonomy, and stability, enabling those we support to grow and thrive.

Our multidisciplinary team works collaboratively to create individualised care plans tailored to the unique needs and aspirations of each child. Our therapeutic model integrates the PACE principles — Playfulness, Acceptance, Curiosity, and Empathy — alongside Dyadic Developmental Practice (DDP), ensuring every interaction fosters safety, trust, and connection.

At ORAH Care, we believe in empowering young lives through compassion, professionalism, and dedication. Our commitment is to nurture resilience, promote emotional wellbeing, and achieve positive outcomes for every child and young person in our care.

 We work closely with local authorities and commissioners to ensure the right placements and the right outcomes.

Name: Egestorff Stiftung
Description:
Ein Zuhause zum Wohlfühlen
 
Die Egestorff Stiftung ist eine Einrichtung der Seniorenhilfe. Wir unterstützen Menschen in alles  Phasen des Älterwerdens.  Dank der Spende von Johann Egestorff in 1896, arbeiten wir in einem wunderschönen Umfeld, das geprägt ist von denkmalgeschützten Bauwerken, Wäldern und Wiesen.
 
Als Bewohner oder Mieter finden rund 400 ältere Menschen bei uns ihr Zuhause. Unser Angebote reicht von der Ambulanten- über die Tages- bis zur Dauerpflege mit Fachbereichen für die Demenz-, Intensiv- und die gerontopsychatrische Pflege.
 
Seit mehr als einem Jahrhundert ist die Stiftung ein beständiger und sicherer Arbeitgeber. In den vielen Jahren ist bei uns ein familiäres Arbeitsumfeld entstanden, in welchem Kollegen und Kolleginnen kollegial füreinander einstehen.

Name: Riseley House Ltd
Description:
Riseley House Residential Care Home is on Riseley Street in Macclesfield, under ownership of the provider; Laurel Bank Residential Care Home Limited. The care home opened following modernisation, adaptation and extensive internal and external refurbishment and building works. 

Riseley House is designed by a provider with 30 years experience to suit the needs of older people from Macclesfield, the surrounding areas of Cheshire East, and further across the country as required. We will accommodate up to 67 residents following thorough assessment of their needs, to ensure they are suitably and safely cared for. Our bedrooms have ensuite shower rooms, we have several choices of lounge area, dining facility, and library/quiet areas. We have an onsite therapy room and separate hairdressing facilities. We have a spacious, green garden designed for socialising and activity, and a separate courtyard for relaxing. 

We have designed and examined all areas of the building to ensure that they promote independence and safety, for example; our windows are designed to be a size that can not allow any person to fall from, so can be opened without restriction to encourage air flow; all heavy furniture is secured to the walls; all paintings are securely fastened to the wall. We have 2 passenger lifts that will allow stretchers to enter in it's horizontal position for passenger comfort. 

We will use systems that promote thorough and detailed documentation and record keeping, and will support staff to be competent in their use, through audit and monitoring. We have CCTV, internal emergency telephone system, staff pager system, an E-Care plan system, that together provide extra safety measures to protect our vulnerable residents. We will deliver care using a staffing structure that is generous, whilst providing support, mentorship and professional development to all staff members.

Name: High Brake House Residential Home
Description:
Tucked on the edge of Clitheroe, the Ribble Valley’s historic market town, we’ve been looking after people in our lovingly updated care home since 2003.

Take a virtual peek inside our spacious and homely living space, with its modern rooms and personal touches.

Our residents think their home is a little bit special. They all started a new chapter of life here, to benefit from round-the-clock care while retaining their independence.

We look forward to being part of your life story.

High Brake House is a real family affair. We (Hannah Townson and Mark Brierley) are sister and brother. We purchased the home back in 2003 with our parents David and Kathleen.

New to the care industry, we armed ourselves with Level 4 qualifications in Care, the Registered Manager’s Award, and the existing manager’s wealth of knowledge (she even taught us how to make a bed).

Our first task as new owner-managers was some serious DIY. It was all hands on deck building the first of four extensions. Our vision was to create a place where people would truly feel at home and enjoy generous living spaces and bedrooms with ensuite wetrooms.

The last structural addition was completed in 2017. Mark’s fantastic vision, his wife Liz’s interior design skills and Hannah’s eye for detail have resulted in the home we dreamed of creating.

As High Brake House has grown, our families have too. Hannah got married, waved off from High Brake by the residents, and in 2013 they waved hello to her new baby girl. Mark married Liz, who keeps our office in check, and they have two beautiful boys. Our residents love to see the children when they drop in.

We are immensely proud of what we’ve created. Its fabric, and the fantastic staff that work so hard with us to make High Brake House a home.

We welcome you to come and stay for a while. Soak up the atmosphere, see how you feel, and discover how our family can care for you and yours.

Name: Mandarin Ducklings Nurseries
Description:
The first Mandarin Ducklings nursery setting was launched in 2013 in St Margaret’s and was followed in 2017 by a second setting nearby. In Spring 2022, we are opening our third nursery in Putney Bridge area. We are pleased that we can offer our special approach to early years education to a greater number of families in South West London. 

So, what makes Mandarin Ducklings so special?


There are many reasons and every day exciting things happen at our existing settings, but there are three primary factors which, when combined, make Mandarin Ducklings quite a unique nursery offer.

Firstly, we centre our approach around Montessori teaching.  This provides an excellent framework focused on each individual child’s physical and psychological development and allows them to unleash their ability to learn through meaningful and fun activities.

Equally important to us is providing children with the opportunity to learn and appreciate nature and the world around them.   We consequently conduct as many traditional learning activities as possible outdoors so that our children experience the wonders of nature in both their learning, as well as playing, experiences.  I think we can all agree that, especially over the past couple of years, far too much time has been spent inside! 


And then there’s the remarkable capability of young children to absorb and learn new languages – far better than older children and adults, in fact!  Because of this, the third element of our unique positioning is to have created a bilingual environment where we introduce the children to Chinese Mandarin from the very earliest moment.  It plays a daily part of the Mandarin Ducklings experience and to witness the pride with which the children show off their new phrases and Chinese songs to their parents is something really quite special.  Indeed, not to be outdone, those parents often turn their attention to picking up snippets of vocabulary too!

Name: St. John's Village
Description:
A Legacy of Care in Yolo County – Since 1964

For over 59 years, St. John’s Village has proudly served as a cornerstone of senior care in Yolo County. Nestled in the heart of our agricultural community, we are committed to providing a safe, compassionate, and vibrant environment for residents aged 65 and older. Offering a continuum of care—including independent living, assisted living, and memory care—we’re here to ensure every senior feels at home, supported, and valued.

A New Chapter Begins

After a temporary closure during the pandemic, we are thrilled to announce that St. John’s Village has reopened its doors! Backed by a passionate new Board, Advisory Team, and the Friends of St. John’s Retirement Village, we are dedicated to restoring and enhancing our services to meet the growing needs of seniors in Yolo County.

Our Current Services:

Independent Living: Cottages and apartments designed for active seniors seeking connection and convenience within a welcoming community.

Our Vision for the Future:

Assisted Living: Personalized care in a comfortable and supportive environment.
Memory Care: Specialized services tailored to meet the unique needs of residents with dementia.

Be Part of Our Mission

As Yolo County’s senior population grows, so does the demand for quality senior care. Your tax-deductible donation helps us continue our nearly six-decade legacy of compassionate service while meeting the evolving needs of our community.

Let’s Grow Together

St. John’s Village is more than a senior care facility—it’s a community rooted in connection, tradition, and care. Name: Georgia Brown Blosser Home for the Aged Women
Description:
The Georgia Brown Blosser Home for Women is a home in every sense of the word. Established in 1932, the Blosser Home is a warm and cheerful residence for mature women who find that they would like a bit of help in managing their home and nutritional needs or who prefer to live in community with others.

At the Blosser Home, we make every effort to accommodate the needs of each resident and treat them as an individual. We allow the freedom of coming and going as each resident wishes. We even have staff to assist with private parties or gatherings of family and friends that our residents may desire. There is a delightful sunroom, terrace, formal dining room and family room available to relax and enjoy visitors or simply rest for a quiet evening.

We ask that residents are relatively self-sufficient in their personal hygiene and self-care, and we do ask that they be able to walk up and down a flight of stairs. For their own safety, residents must be able to ambulate out of the building in the case of an emergency. We do, however, make every effort to accommodate those who use a cane or walkers, on the first level. In the interest of safety, residents’ medications are kept in secured storage and are dispensed as prescribed and as necessary.

Name: Fundació Privada i Benèfica ASSIS
Description:
La Fundació Privada i Benèfica ASSÍS nació con el objetivo de prestar una atención integral a las personas mayores que requieren de un apoyo en diferentes ámbitos de su vida diaria.

Es con esta finalidad que nuestro fundador, el padre capuchino Lleó de Vilalba logra poner en marcha la Residència Assís el año 1973. El objetivo, además de asistir a los necesitados, pasaba por buscar a la gente mayor un hogar donde profesionales, guiados por el espíritu de servicio franciscano, y residentes, formaran una familia que todos sintieran como suya.

Más de 50 años más tarde, seguimos trabajando guiados por el mismo objetivo y con la misma ilusión. A día de hoy, la Residència Assís acoge a 110 personas mayores a las cuales les garantiza su bienestar gracias a más de 65 profesionales comprometidos.

El contexto económico actual dificulta la sostenibilidad de nuestro proyecto. Es por ello que ahora, más que nunca, necesitamos tu ayuda para seguir cuidando de las personas mayores como se merecen. La Fundació tiene un carácter social, sin ánimo de lucro, y trabaja para la cohesión de la sociedad, buscando la transformación social y la mejora de las condiciones de vida, especialmente de las personas en situación desfavorecida para las cuales promueve una vida lo más autónoma y digna posible.

Name: Nordik-Care
Description:
Bei Nordik Care steht der Mensch mit seiner Selbstbestimmung und individuellen Lebensgeschichte im Mittelpunkt. Unsere Pflege basiert auf dem personzentrierten Ansatz und orientiert sich am Strukturmodell, das in Anlehnung an die Grundsätze der WHO (Weltgesundheitsorganisation) entwickelt wurde. Dieses Modell ermöglicht eine effiziente, individuelle und rechtssichere Pflegeplanung, bei der die persönlichen Bedürfnisse, Fähigkeiten und Wünsche der Pflegebedürftigen im Vordergrund stehen.

Unsere Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner werden aktiv in die Gestaltung ihrer Pflege einbezogen. In einem partnerschaftlichen Aushandlungsprozess legen wir gemeinsam Ziele fest und erarbeiten eine individuelle Tagesstruktur, die ihre bisherigen Gewohnheiten und Lebensführung berücksichtigt. Dadurch fördern wir die Selbstbestimmung und erhalten die persönliche Verantwortung für das eigene Leben so weit wie möglich.

Das Strukturmodell erleichtert zudem die Pflegeplanung, indem es bürokratische Hürden reduziert und eine praxisnahe, ressourcenschonende Dokumentation ermöglicht. So bleibt mehr Zeit für die eigentliche Pflege und die persönliche Zuwendung. Gleichzeitig gewährleisten wir durch unsere hohen Qualitätsstandards und die ständige Fortbildung unserer Mitarbeitenden, dass unsere Pflegeleistungen stets auf dem neuesten wissenschaftlichen Stand sind.



Moderne Einrichtungen & ein Umfeld des Respekts
Unsere modernen Einrichtungen bieten eine hochwertige Ausstattung, die Sicherheit mit einer warmen, wohnlichen Atmosphäre verbindet. Ein weiterer zentraler Aspekt unseres Pflegeleitbilds ist die Förderung von Toleranz und Respekt. Wir schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem sich alle Menschen – unabhängig von Herkunft, Lebensweise oder persönlichen Überzeugungen – angenommen und wertgeschätzt fühlen.

Unser Ziel ist es, Pflege nicht nur professionell, sondern auch herzlich und individuell zu gestalten.

- Individuelle und kontinuierliche Betreuung für Senioren und chronisch kranken Menschen.
- Flexible Unterstützung in Zeiten von Personalmangel oder erhöhtem Pflegebedarf.
- Fachkundige Beratung und Schulung für Pflegeeinrichtungen und deren Mitarbeiter/Lernende. 
- Effiziente Planung und Koordination von Pflegeprozessen.

Meine Mission:
Bei TempCare Büeler steht der Mensch im Mittelpunkt. Mein Ziel ist es, durch meine Dienstleistungen die Lebensqualität meiner Bewohner zu verbessern und Pflegeeinrichtungen zu entlasten. Ich setze auf Professionalität, Empathie und Zuverlässigkeit, um eine vertrauensvolle und nachhaltige Pflegebeziehung zu schaffen.

Kontaktieren Sie mich:

Name: Unicorn Garden, Inc.
Description:
Unicorn Garden was created to assist foster youth to mature into competent self-sufficient and productive adults.  In order to reach this goal, the youth are provided with a stable, structured, and supportive environment that emphasizes learning basic living skills, implementing positive reinforcements, and intensive in house mental health services from Licensed Practitioners of the Healing Arts and rehabilitation specialists all within the confines of a Short Term Residential Therapeutic Program (STRTP) licensed by California’s Department of Social Services and Department of Health Care Services.

The overall focus of our program is behavior modification. Unicorn utilizes strength-based methods, Trauma Informed Care, and intensive mental health services (Psychological evaluations and testing, individual therapy, group therapy, crisis intervention, and psychotropic medication management). Our staff is trained to use de-escalation methods and techniques in problem solving.  Therapy group is mainly cognitive-behavioral approach, where emphasis is placed upon focusing on unresolved conflicts with self and others, renewing thought processes, development of verbal and nonverbal skills, and specific behaviors and their effect on others.  Also, more specific emphasis is placed on examining a youth’s own core family and what inside and outside resources are available to the youth in order to function more effectively and to develop a sense of identity and belonging to a family and the community. 

Unicorn Garden provides multiple opportunities for the youth under our care to mature, grow and expand their overall knowledge and experiences.  We utilize an Independent Living Skills Program teaching our youth vital real-world skills such as: job searching, resume building, interviewing, budgeting, banking, transportation options (California Driver’s License and Golden Empire Transit bus transportation), cooking, housing searching and acquisition.

Name: Las Gardenias Residencial para Adultos Mayores
Description:
"Las Gardenias" es una residencia para adultos mayores que va más allá de ser simplemente un lugar de residencia; es un refugio acogedor donde se prioriza la calidad de vida y el bienestar de sus residentes. Situada en un entorno sereno y tranquilo, esta residencia ofrece un ambiente hogareño que fomenta la independencia y la plenitud en la vida de quienes la habitan.

En "Las Gardenias", cada día está lleno de oportunidades para el crecimiento personal y la diversión. Desde actividades físicas diseñadas para mantener la vitalidad y la salud, hasta eventos culturales que estimulan la mente y el espíritu, se ofrece una amplia gama de opciones para satisfacer los gustos y preferencias individuales, cada día ofrece una variedad de experiencias gratificantes que enriquecen la vida de los residentes.

Además de las actividades recreativas, "Las Gardenias" se enorgullece de ofrecer cuidados médicos de primera calidad para garantizar la seguridad y el bienestar de todos sus residentes. Un equipo dedicado de profesionales médicos y personal de apoyo está siempre disponible para brindar atención personalizada y responder a cualquier necesidad que pueda surgir, proporcionando tranquilidad y confianza tanto a los residentes como a sus familias.

Sin embargo, lo que realmente distingue a "Las Gardenias" es el sentido de comunidad y compañerismo que se fomenta entre sus residentes. Aquí, las relaciones florecen y se fortalecen, proporcionando no solo apoyo emocional, sino también una sensación de pertenencia y conexión.

"Las Gardenias" es mucho más que un lugar para vivir; es un hogar donde los adultos mayores pueden encontrar tranquilidad, cuidado y una comunidad amorosa en la que disfrutar de sus años dorados con plenitud y felicidad. Con un ambiente acogedor, una amplia gama de actividades estimulantes y un enfoque centrado en el bienestar integral, "Las Gardenias" ofrece a sus residentes la oportunidad de vivir una vida plena y significativa en sus años de jubilación.

Name: WAiK
Description:
WAik: Conversations, not checkboxes.

Our mission is to restore the human element to care by liberating caregivers and administrators from the paperwork nightmare that fuels burnout and undermines safety.

Why We Exist: The Problem The senior care industry is trapped in a "cycle of failure". A single incident, like a fall, forces a nurse to spend 2-3 hours on compliance paperwork, often hours after the event. This burden leads to:

Staff Burnout: Driving a turnover crisis that costs $50,000+ to replace a single nurse.

Bad Data: Rushed, "check-box" reports that obscure the truth—with 43% of major falls going unreported.

Massive Risk: Exposing facilities to crippling compliance fines and preventing any real safety improvements.

What We Do: Our Solution WAik transforms this broken workflow. We turn the 2-3 hour burden into a 5-minute guided voice conversation on a staff member's phone, right at the scene.

How We Solve It: Our Innovation Our AI-native platform delivers value at every level:

For Staff: We give them back their time, allowing them to focus on their real job: care.

For Administrators: We deliver an instant, 100% complete, audit-ready report, ending the administrative "back-and-forth".

For the Facility: We provide true "Incident Intelligence". For the first time, our AI can analyze the full narrative of all reports to find the hidden root cause of incidents, moving you from reactive reporting to proactive prevention.

We are starting with incident reporting (falls, med errors) and are building the full-stack compliance and insights engine for the future of senior care.
Primary Industry: Nursing Homes and Residential Care Facilities

MÅLGRUPPE

Name: Stichting Vida Ruach
Description:
Een groeiend aantal jongeren kampt met psychische klachten, is niet actief in werk of onderwijs, het woningtekort is nijpend vooral voor jongeren zonder vangnet en de stap naar hulpverlening is soms nog ver weg. Wij bieden tijd en ruimte aan deze jongeren om tot zichzelf te komen. Een plek waar ze zich veilig voelen, gezien worden, en op adem mogen komen.

Vanuit die nood én ons hart is het initiatief voor Stichting Vida Ruach ontstaan. Een kleinschalige, tijdelijke woonplek waar jongeren mogen landen, herstellen en opnieuw hun richting vinden omringd door liefdevolle begeleiding en, waar gewenst, gedragen door geloof. Wij geloven dat ieder mens, hoe kwetsbaar ook, recht heeft op een plek waar herstel mag beginnen. 

Daarom openen wij ons hart en de deuren van Stichting Vida Ruach voor jongeren die vanuit Mozaïek om hulp vragen, en bieden wij hun een veilige en liefdevolle plek om stap voor stap te mogen herstellen.

Name: The Villages of San Luis Obispo
Description:
Happiness is the key to living the best life at any age. It's why at The Villages of San Luis Obispo we provide the means to enjoy vibrant living full of connection, purpose, passion and love.

Independent Living (@ The Palms & The Oaks):
Living at The Villages relieves the worry and stress of keeping up a house, cooking three meals a day and paying bills. Residents enjoy their golden years. The Villages' independent living communities at The Palms and The Oaks allow residents to maintain friendships and family ties; take trips, socialize by the pool, attend events in the Central Coast community, and relax in a comforting, supportive environment.

Assisted Living (@ Garden Creek):
While all of our residents enjoy engaged, active lives some require a little more help with life’s day-to-day details. Assisted living at Garden Creek provides residents help with those little things so they can spend more time enjoying life. Whether it's help with cooking, housekeeping, coordinating medication, keeping up with doctor's appointments or just getting around, The Village at Garden Creek provides a wide range of assisted living services for its residents.

Memory Care (@ Sydney Creek):
Caring for a loved one with Alzheimer’s and dementia is emotionally challenging—as is the decision to move them into a Memory Care community. Health, safety, and quality of life were top priorities as we designed a unique environment that encourages residents to interact with their community, enjoy favorite pastimes, and stay connected. The Village at Sydney Creek is here to assist with this transition.

Name: Rancho Penasquitos Senior Living
Description:
Your Life, Your Way
Nestled near picturesque canyons, dramatic mountains, and world-renowned coastlines, living in San Diego, California, has its perks. At Rancho Penasquitos Senior Living, we invite our residents to take advantage of everything Southern California offers, with our convenient location near world-class dining, exciting shopping, and one-of-a-kind points of interest. We offer comprehensive Independent Living, Assisted Living, and Memory Care programs designed to provide residents with an ideal balance of support and independence tailored to their unique care needs, making it possible to live each day to the fullest with total peace of mind.

Spacious, warm, and inviting, our customized apartment homes set the stage for our residents to enjoy an inspired lifestyle. With staff on-site 24-hours a day and emergency alert systems in each apartment, our residents may request assistance with ease — any time they need it. Our community features open hallways and easy-to-navigate common spaces, with luxury amenities and conveniences like our full-service salon, our restaurant-style dining room, and our library just a few steps away from their home.

Take advantage of the beautiful San Diego weather with our professionally-landscaped outdoor spaces, secured walking paths, and outdoor dining space. Take a stroll through our courtyard, or sit down at one of our benches while enjoying your favorite book.

We have it all at Rancho Penasquitos Senior Living, from our convenient San Diego, California location to our resort-style amenities. We invite your family to see our residence in person and learn more about what it means to call Rancho Penasquitos Senior Living home by taking a personalized tour. To schedule a tour or request more information, please give us a call.

We also provide advanced therapies such as IV treatment, tracheostomy care, physical, occupational, and speech therapy.

Therapy services are provided by Reliant Rehabilitation, offering specialized programs designed to enhance mobility, restore confidence, and support independence.

At Independence, we combine medical excellence with meaningful recreation and community engagement, ensuring that residents not only heal but also thrive.

Admissions are available 24/7. To learn more, visit us at 600 West Cheltenham Avenue in Philadelphia or call (215) 927-7300.

In meiner freiberuflichen Pflegepraxis, gemäss dem Leitbild für freiberufliche Pflegefachpersonen des SBK, verpflichte ich mich dazu, eine erstklassige Pflege und Betreuung anzubieten. Ich lege besonderen Wert auf Hingabe und Fachwissen, um Ihre Gesundheit zu fördern und Ihr Wohlbefinden zu steigern.

Als freiberufliche Pflegefachfrau übernehme ich die fachliche Verantwortung für die Pflege und Betreuung meiner Patienten. Ich setze auf kontinuierliche Weiterbildung, um mein Fachwissen aktuell zu halten und die besten Pflegestandards zu gewährleisten. Diese Verantwortung erstreckt sich auf die sorgfältige Planung und Durchführung von Pflegemassnahmen, die Einhaltung medizinischer Richtlinien und die enge Zusammenarbeit mit anderen Gesundheitsdienstleistern. Mir ist bewusst, dass meine fachliche Kompetenz direkten Einfluss auf das Wohlbefinden und die Genesung meiner Patienten hat, und ich nehme diese Verantwortung mit höchster Ernsthaftigkeit wahr.

Name: The Nurses Nest
Description:
WHO WE ARE:
The Nurses Nest is a leading online platform dedicated to solving the housing challenges faced by travel nurses during their assignments. Our team is composed of experienced travel nurses who understand the unique needs of their colleagues and are committed to providing a reliable housing solution.

WHAT WE DO:
Our platform offers travel nurses access to carefully screened housing options that cater to their unique needs. We provide a wide range of rentals, including houses, condos, apartments, and shared spaces, as well as compatibility with roommates. We are dedicated to making the housing search process easier for travel nurses so they can focus on their work.

HOW WE DO IT:
We have developed a cutting-edge solution that streamlines the housing search process for travel nurses. We utilize technology to provide direct transactions, roommate request options, and background checks. Our website and app functionality is user-friendly, making it easy for travel nurses to find the perfect housing option.

WHAT MAKES US DIFFERENT:
At The Nurses Nest, we differentiate ourselves from competitors by providing quality rentals at lower subscription fees. Our commitment to honesty and dependability means we only offer reliable housing options that are fully screened. We are also invested in the success of our clients and work tirelessly to provide solutions to their housing challenges.

READY TO TALK:
If you are a travel nurse looking for housing during your assignment or a property owner interested in renting to travel nurses, The Nurses Nest is ready to talk. Contact us today to learn more about how we can help you find the perfect housing solution.

SPECIALTIES:
Our specialties include providing quality housing options for travel nurses, direct transactions, roommate request options, background checks, easy website and app functionality, and a commitment to honesty and dependability.

Name: Stuurgroep Zorg Vlaams-Brabant
Description:
Een netwerk sinds 2011
Het Platform Zorg Vlaams-Brabant werd in 2011 opgericht op initiatief van Walter Sablon (Zorgnet-Icuro). Ter inspiratie bracht de stuurgroep eerst een bezoek aan de overleggroep bewonerszorg in West-Vlaanderen. Sindsdien groeide het platform uit tot een vaste ontmoetingsplaats voor verantwoordelijken (bewonerszorg) in de woonzorgcentra van de provincie.
Wie zijn we?
De Stuurgroep Zorg bestaat uit verantwoordelijken (bewonerszorg) van diverse woonzorgcentra, met ondersteuning van Zorgnet-Icuro. Het Platform Zorg verenigt alle verantwoordelijken (bewonerszorg) van woonzorgcentra die aangesloten zijn bij Brandpunt Ouderenzorg Vlaams-Brabant.
Wat doen we?
•	we organiseren driemaandelijkse bijeenkomsten rond actuele thema’s uit de zorgpraktijk, gaande van klinische onderwerpen tot HR en management.
•	we bieden een forum voor overleg, kennisdeling en netwerking.
•	we ontwikkelen een jaarlijks vormingsprogramma voor leidinggevenden onder meer ter ondersteuning van het functiecomplement.
•	we begeleiden intervisiegroepen kwaliteitszorg.
•	we zetten in op studiereizen en werkbezoeken om innovatieve zorgpraktijken te ontdekken.
•	we werken nauw samen met het Provinciaal Bureau Ouderenzorg.
Wat hebben we al gerealiseerd?
Doorheen de jaren realiseerde de stuurgroep samen met het platform een breed scala aan initiatieven:
•	Een structureel netwerk voor zorgverantwoordelijken in Vlaams-Brabant.
•	Talrijke vormingen en studiedagen rond actuele thema’s zoals GDPR, IFIC, VIA5, ethisch zorgbeleid, arbeidswetgeving, veranderingsmanagement en vroegtijdige zorgplanning.
•	Inspirerende studiereizen naar vernieuwende projecten in Vlaanderen, zoals Triamant in Velm, WZC Hof ter Schelde en het Nottebohm-project in Antwerpen.
•	Ondersteuning van leidinggevenden via opleidingen in samenwerking met o.a. het NVKVV en de Vlerick Business School.
•	Concrete impulsen voor kwaliteitsverbetering, onder meer via projecten rond fixatiearm beleid, intimiteit en seksualiteit in de

Description:
Cottage Grove Post Acute in Cottage Grove, OR, offers compassionate 24/7 skilled nursing care and short-term rehabilitation in a safe, state-of-the-art setting that feels like home. Our dedicated team provides personalized physical, occupational, and speech therapy six to seven days a week, with specialty programs in joint replacement, stroke recovery, cardiac and pulmonary care, wound management, tracheostomy care, cancer recovery, and pain management.

Residents benefit from individualized care plans developed by an interdisciplinary team focused on healing, dignity, and a smooth transition home. On-site services include pharmacy, lab, and X-ray, as well as infusion therapy, and coordinated palliative and hospice care.

Daily life at Cottage Grove is enriched by engaging activities, transportation assistance, nutrition and dietary support, and specialized programs like fall prevention and balance training. With both private and semi-private rooms and Medicare/Medicaid acceptance, Cottage Grove Post Acute is committed to helping patients recover, regain independence, and return home with confidence.

Name: Good Cleaning
Description:
Somos a Good Cleaning, uma empresa que se preocupa no bem-estar e nas relações dentro e fora da sua empresa.

Sobre Nós

Fundada em 2021, a Good Cleaning é uma empresa do setor de prestação de serviços e comércio de produtos de limpeza. Com uma trajetória marcada pela excelência e inovação, nos dedicamos a oferecer soluções completas e personalizadas para atender às necessidades de nossos clientes.

Nossa Missão

Nossa missão é proporcionar ambientes limpos, saudáveis e agradáveis, contribuindo para o bem-estar e a qualidade de vida de nossos clientes. Para isso, utilizamos produtos de alta qualidade e técnicas avançadas de limpeza, sempre respeitando o meio ambiente.

Nossos Serviços

Oferecemos uma ampla gama de serviços de limpeza, conservação, vigilância e serviços gerais sempre com profissionais treinados e experientes.

Nossos Produtos

Além dos serviços de limpeza, comercializamos uma linha completa de produtos de limpeza com Certificação e ISO de qualidade, além da referência no mercado.

Compromisso com a Qualidade

Na Good Cleaning, a qualidade é nossa prioridade. Contamos com uma equipe de profissionais altamente capacitados e utilizamos produtos e equipamentos de última geração para garantir a satisfação de nossos clientes. Nosso compromisso é oferecer um serviço eficiente, seguro e de alta qualidade.

Sustentabilidade

Estamos comprometidos com a sustentabilidade e a preservação do meio ambiente. Nossos produtos são selecionados com base em critérios rigorosos de segurança e impacto ambiental, e nossas práticas de limpeza são projetadas para minimizar o uso de recursos naturais e reduzir a geração de resíduos.

Contato

Entre em contato conosco para saber mais sobre nossos serviços e produtos. Estamos à disposição para atender suas necessidades e oferecer soluções personalizadas.

Name: myRespiteAccom
Description:
myRespiteAccom.com.au is the first Australianonline booking digital platform where Aged Care service providers can list their services and take bookings for residential respite accommodation.  

It will allow carer or respite seeking participants to search and book residential respite care at an Aged Care facility of choice with the same ease as booking a hotel accommodation! 

This platform is for:  
(1) Government approved Aged Care Service Providerswho provide Residential Respite Care (High Care and Low Care) at their facility. The platform allows them to list their facility, manage availability and process booking request and confirmation; 
 
(2) Residential respite care seekers. Residential respite care is short-term care delivered within an aged care home on either a planned or emergency basis. An assessment by an Aged Care Assessment Team (ACAT) is required to access residential respite care. Eligible care recipients are approved for either high or low level residential respite care. 

(3) Medical Practitioners who need quickly locate and check availability for Respite Care at the Nursing Home facilities and advise their patients accordingly.

Die LILIEN PFLEGEGESELLSCHAFT vereint mit den Seniorenzentren Am Königsfloß und Ingweilerhof zwei Einrichtungen, die sich der liebevollen und professionellen Pflege älterer Menschen widmen. Unser Ziel ist es, ein Zuhause zu schaffen, in dem sich unsere Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner sicher, wohl und geborgen fühlen.

Unsere Leistungen sind vielseitig und individuell auf die Bedürfnisse jedes Einzelnen abgestimmt. Im Bereich Betreutes Wohnen bieten wir Ihnen die Möglichkeit, ein selbstbestimmtes Leben in einer unterstützenden Gemeinschaft zu führen.

Darüber hinaus bieten wir Kurzzeitpflege für die vorübergehende Betreuung sowie stationäre Pflege für diejenigen, die eine intensive und dauerhafte Unterstützung benötigen. Unser engagiertes Team aus erfahrenen Pflegekräften steht Ihnen dabei mit Herz und Verstand zur Seite.

Die LILIEN PFLEGEGESELLSCHAFT ist mehr als nur ein Pflegeanbieter, wir sind ein Ort, an dem Menschlichkeit und Fürsorge an erster Stelle stehen. Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam den Weg zu einem erfüllten und würdevollen Leben gestalten.

Name: Woonzorg Sint-Vincentius Zulte

Hier werken zorgprofessionals, vrijwilligers, familie en bewoners elke dag samen aan wat écht telt: een waardevol leven, met aandacht voor kleine momenten en grote gebaren.

We geloven dat ouderenzorg begint bij luisteren, nabij zijn en samen genieten van het leven in al zijn facetten.

In ons woonzorgcentrum gaan welzijn en kwaliteit hand in hand. We bouwen aan een omgeving waar bewoners zich geborgen en gezien voelen, waar medewerkers trots zijn op hun werk, en waar familieleden deel uitmaken van het verhaal.

Welkom bij Woonzorg Sint-Vincentius: Zorg met een hart, leven in respect en verbondenheid, bouwen aan een warme thuis voor elke bewoner.

Name: Project Spread JOY

Drake Griffith reached out to two of his life-long friends, Harrison Powe and Reilly Kungl, and they started JOY together as partners. 

Through high goals and hard work, the original JOY team and their successors have built Project Spread JOY into a nationwide community service venture with many impressive accomplishments to date:

160 Teen Volunteers

Over 7000 Letter Requests Fulfilled

Telephone Reach out and Support for Older Adults

70+ Pen Pals Created

13 States Reached

Name: RESIDÈNCIA AURO NATURA
Description:
Auró Natura es una residéncia para personas con discapacidad intelectual o sensorial en la que vivimos y trabajamos en medio de la naturaleza. 

Estamos todo el dia vinculados al entorno natural: Nuestras instalaciones estan construidas en bioconstrucción, y se encuentran en medio de la montaña. Nuestros jardines son el bosque, las plantas aromáticas, la huerta...
En nuestro espacio encontráis el Refugio de Emma, un espacio de acogida y cuidado de animales que han sido desatendidos en algún momento de su vida. 
Convivimos así con caballos, cabras, ovejas, gallinas, gallos, cerditos, burros.... y otros animales de granja. 

En la atención a nuestras personas usuarias diseñamos un programa individual donde promover la autonomía de la persona al máximo nivel a través de objetivos individualizados. 

Nuestro trabajo profesional vertebral se basa en la Técnica Green Cares, una metodología europea que trabaja el bienestar integral de la persona a través de tu vinculación natural con el planeta y la bio coexistencia. 

En Auró Natura puedes encontrar:

- Residencia en estancias temporales
- Residencia en estancias permanentes
- Residencia de estancias con objetivos terapéuticos

La estancias terapéuticas están abiertas al público en general para trabajar addiciones, espacios vitales de  trauma personal, situaciones de riesgo familiar, episodios emocionales..

Disponemos de 10 plazas residenciales para un trabajo de pequeña ratio consiguiendo así una personalidad profesional íntima y centrada en la persona. 

En el programa profesional mantenemos una visión integral de la persona, atendiendo su bienestar físico, social, emocional e intelectual. 

Estamos en contacto diario con las distintas entidades sociales del pueblo, y participamos activamente de la vida social y cultural.

Description:
חברת Mirpower מתמחה בייעוץ וליווי אישי למשפחות ולקשישים הזקוקים לשירותי סיעוד עם מטפלים זרים.
עם ניסיון של מעל 15 שנה בתחום, אנו מסייעים בתהליכים המורכבים של קבלת היתר להעסקת עובד זר, איתור והתאמה של מטפלים מוסמכים – רובם מאוזבקיסטן – ועד הגעת המטפל לארץ.

החזון שלנו הוא להפוך תהליך שיכול להיות מבלבל ומלחיץ, לחוויה ברורה, רגועה ומכבדת — תוך הקשבה מלאה לצרכים של כל משפחה.
אנחנו פועלים מתוך מחויבות למקצועיות, אמינות ורגישות, ומספקים שירותים בפריסה ארצית.

תחום הליווי והשירות שלנו: 
- היתר להעסקת עובד זר- ליווי בהגשת בקשות להיתר העסקת עובד זר, מול משרד הפנים והיחידה לעובדים זרים – כולל סיוע בטפסים, מסמכים ובירוקרטיה עד קבלת האישור.

- ביטוח לאומי- סיוע בהגשת תביעות והכרה בזכויות הסיעוד מול ביטוח לאומי- ייעוץ מקצועי במילוי טפסים, הכנה לוועדות רפואיות ומעקב אחר תהליך הזכאות.

- ייעוץ והכוונה למשפחות- פגישה אישית הכוללת מיפוי צרכים, המלצות מקצועיות ותמיכה בקבלת החלטות.

- בתי אבות ודיור מוגן- הכוונה מותאמת אישית למציאת מסגרת מתאימה –ברחבי הארץ.

תמיד פה ללוות אתכם ברגישות, במקצועיות ובאמינות.

Name: Olivier
Description:
Olivier is een Wooninitiatief, een initiatief dat de ouders hebben genomen.

Olivier bestaat uit een groep van twaalf jongvolwassenen met een verstandelijke en/of lichamelijke beperking. Olivier biedt zorg en begeleiding die zijn afgestemd op hun individuele behoeften.
De jongvolwassenen wonen in zelfstandige huurappartementen, gegroepeerd rondom een gemeenschappelijke leefruimte. Daarin is ook de slaap- en kantoorruimte opgenomen van het personeel dat de 24-uurszorg levert.

Alle jongvolwassenen (in het vervolg ‘bewoners’ genoemd) hebben behoefte aan structuur, rust en regelmaat in hun dagritme. Ze kunnen altijd terugvallen op een veilige thuishaven.

De keuze voor een Wooninitiatief heeft gevolgen voor de betrokkenheid van ouders en verwanten.
Olivier verwacht van de ouders en/of andere familieleden van de bewoners dat zij zich in woord en daad inzetten voor het welslagen van ons Wooninitiatief. Er worden hoge eisen gesteld aan de betrokkenheid op elkaar, het open staan voor anderen en de zorg en inzet voor het collectief, naast de aandacht voor het eigen kind. Van de ouders wordt verwacht dat zij tal van ondersteunende diensten ten behoeve van de Olivier verrichten.

Doel van Olivier is de divers samengestelde groep bewoners met een beperking, onder regie van de ouders, de benodigde professionele zorg en begeleiding te bieden, in een beschermende woonomgeving.
Olivier streeft na dat zij zich maximaal kunnen ontplooien
en een zo normaal mogelijk leven kunnen leiden, midden in de samenleving.

Name: EVIDY
Description:
Evidy erbjuder dig som ska bygga, förvalta eller driva ett vård- och omsorgsboende en
helhetslösning där teknik, inredning och aktivt ljus är integrerat.
Vi tycker det ska vara enkelt att skapa ett hemtrevligt, modernt och tryggt äldreboende.
Därför har vi format ett koncept, självklart med utrymme för anpassning till just ditt projekt,
med beprövade lösningar som vi vet fungerar.
Grunden i vår lösning är omsorgsfullt våra framtagna armaturer som skapar en hemlik känsla
och ger rätt ljus på rätt plats. Tillsammans med en inredning där material, färger och ljus sam-
spelar gestaltar vi likt scenografer själva scenen för livet som pågår på boendet.
Själva hjärtat i vår lösning är våra styrsystem som erbjuder dig snabb och enkel tillgång till
evidensbaserad ljusdesign och automatisering. Det ger dig både föränderligt och aktivt ljus
och stora tekniska fördelar.
Vår idé är att med hjälp av teknik, erfarenhet och genomtänkt design erbjuda en
enklare, tryggare och smidigare vardag för både de boende och personalen.
Tryggt och intuitivt.

Name: Seniorenzentren Recklinghausen
Description:
Die Seniorenzentren Recklinghausen sind eine Gruppe von vier Pflegeeinrichtungen, die sich in Recklinghausen und Dorsten im nördlichen Ruhrgebiet befinden. Zu unseren Einrichtungen gehören das Seniorenzentrum St. Marien in Dorsten, das Seniorenzentrum Sandershof und das Seniorenzentrum Suderwich in Recklinghausen sowie das Seniorenzentrum Südwall in Dorsten.

Unsere Einrichtungen sind darauf ausgerichtet, den Menschen in den Mittelpunkt zu stellen. Wir verstehen uns nicht nur als Pflegeeinrichtung, sondern als ein Zuhause für unsere Bewohner. Unsere Mitarbeiter leben sprichwörtlich mit unseren Gästen zusammen und gehen individuell auf ihre Wünsche und Bedürfnisse ein. Wir unterstützen die Eigenständigkeit jedes Einzelnen und schätzen diese, damit die Bewohner unserer Einrichtungen nicht nur wohnen, sondern ein Zuhause finden.

Wir glauben, dass Zeit das wertvollste Gut ist, das wir haben. Deshalb laden wir Sie ein, das Beste daraus zu machen und sich für eines unserer vier Häuser zu entscheiden, die alle etwas ganz Besonderes sind.

Unser Versprechen an Sie ist, dass wir Sie nicht allein lassen. Ihre Fragen sind unser Antrieb - egal ob zur korrekten Anmeldung oder zur richtigen Pflege. Unser Team ist voll und ganz für Sie da1.

Name: Horton Cross Nursing Home
Description:
Horton Cross is situated in the stunning rural hamlet town of Ilminster, in Somerset, with good road links and ample visitor parking.

We have a deep commitment to providing exceptional nursing care, palliative care and support to older people. 
The home has a capacity of 45 beds and includes double bedrooms to accommodate couples. 

We are dedicated to ensuring the well-being of our residents through a range of daily activities and personalised care. We offer care and support for our residents, with a stimulating range of activities, delivered throughout the week by both staff and external providers. We welcome a variety of external visitors for activities that bring excitement and diversity to our residents. These include, The Sharandys Bird of Prey, Connections with Sidmouth Donkey Santuary, Rockin Ronnie, Sing Something Simple Reminiscing, to name a few. Our residents have recently had the chance to meet and interact with alpacas in their bedrooms. We have also hosted visits from Exmoor Zoo.

Our nursing home offers a large private garden for our residents to enjoy all year round.

You can contact the Home direct by calling or emailing to inquire about availability or register your details on our webpage where we will get back to you.

We are looking for dedicated individuals who share our values to join our team at Horton Cross Nursing Home and help us provide top-quality care and enjoyment for our residents. 

Our home is a haven of tranquillity, offering a rural atmosphere with ample space for our residents to relax and enjoy.

Alguns dos nossos serviços:

 Montagem e desmontagem de móveis.

 Venda, instalação e limpeza de painéis solares e pontos de recarga comerciais e residenciais de veículos elétricos. 

 Reparos elétricos: substituição de lâmpadas, resistências, chuveiros, duchas eletrônicas, tomadas, interruptores, disjuntores e lustres. Instalação de sensores de presença, fotocélulas,  luminárias e ventiladores.

 Reparos hidráulicos, instalação de torneiras eletrônicas, bebedouros, torneiras e chuveiros externos, desentupimentos de pias, tanque e vasos sanitários, substituição de torneiras, instalação e manutenção de registros e consertos em caixas d'água.

 Instalação de fornos elétricos, cooktops, refrigeradores, máquinas de lavar, lava e seca, secadoras, TVs, soundbar e home theaters, antenas internas e externas, quadros, prateleiras, painéis de TV, cortinas, miolos, fechaduras normais e eletrônicas. Trocas de layouts internos e externos.

 Limpezas pós obras, limpezas de quintais, calhas, rufos e faxinas.

 Consertos, manutenção e ajustes de portas, portões manuais e eletrônicos, janelas, armários e móveis modulados e sob medida.

 Manutenção e reparos em tetos e paredes danificadas, alvenaria ou madeira em ambientes internos e externos. Correção de rachaduras e manutenção de áreas com infiltração. 

 Pinturas e retoques em geral, internas ou externas. Pinturas com verniz e epóxi. Aplicação de massa corrida e impermeabilizantes.

 Instalação de paredes e divisórias em drywall e acabamentos, com finalização completa.

 Pacotes de serviços para atendimento de anfitrionagem que disponibilizam: check-in e check-out para clientes, organização, limpeza e reparos do imóvel, substituição e lavagem de roupas de cama, toalhas e tapetes, e reposição de itens necessários.

 Fretes rápidos.

Name: Willowbrook Post Acute
Description: Willowbrook Post Acute in Pendleton, OR provides compassionate, round‑the‑clock skilled nursing and short‑term rehabilitation in a friendly, home-like setting. Our licensed team—RNs, LPNs, CNAs, physical, occupational, speech, and respiratory therapists—works with an on-site Medical Director to create personalized care plans. We offer extensive services including IV therapy, complex wound care, pain and diabetes management, post-surgery and pulmonary rehab, Alzheimer’s/dementia support, hospice, respite, and long-term care. The facility is licensed for 59 beds and staffed to exceed state averages in nursing hours, reflecting our dedication to attentive care. Residents stay in private and semi-private rooms, enjoy daily therapy sessions in a modern rehab gym, and participate in recreational activities. Registered dietitian services and social work support smooth care transitions and family engagement. Willowbrook accepts Medicare and Medicaid and holds a strong commitment to quality and patient-centered care. The facility features a warm, comfortable environment with individualized attention, nutritious meals, and meaningful activities that support each resident’s health and well-being. With a focus on restoring independence and dignity, Willowbrook Post Acute helps residents recover with confidence and transition safely home.

Name: Salem Lutheran Home & Rehab
Description:
Located in the scenic Danish Village of Elk Horn, Iowa, our senior housing community feels like home. In this way, we are passionate about what we do, and because Salem is so much more than a business, we are able to deliver the highest quality outcomes of any long-term care facility in the area.
With an astounding variety of activities, facilities and available professionals, we have grown quite a bit since our first days over 80 years ago. Our 24-hour skilled nursing team and Alzheimer’s care experts combine with a comprehensive professional team in order to provide you with a versatile, passionate and qualified staff that is equipped to handle your loved one’s changing and demanding health care needs.
In addition to their physical health, our residents’ mental, emotional and spiritual health is an essential piece of our work. In this way, we offer music, daily Chapel, Sunday Worship services, Bible Study, games, intergenerational programs, crafts, discussion groups and so much more. We believe that each resident should not be limited by their surroundings in order to continue to enjoy the hobbies and interests they had before coming to us.
While all of these have been essential to us since the beginning, we have steadily grown into a community that is able to truly provide for the needs of our residents, we offer rehabilitation services, innovative programs, and so much more in order to encourage creativity, independence and dignity. And we aren’t stopping there.

With expansion projects and dedicated staff, Salem Lutheran Homes & Rehabilitation Center is always looking for new ways to help all of our residents. Contact us today to learn more about our history and our mission, and see how we can help you or your loved one.

Name: Green Lane Movers
Description:
Green Lane Movers can help seniors make a smooth transition to assisted living in a number of ways. First and foremost, Green Lane Movers can handle all of the heavy lifting and logistics of the move, which can be especially beneficial for seniors who may have mobility issues or difficulty handling physical tasks. This includes packing up their belongings, transporting them to the new assisted living facility, and setting everything up in their new home.

In addition to handling the physical aspects of the move, Green Lane Movers can also provide emotional support to seniors during this often stressful and overwhelming time. Green Lane Movers can offer guidance and reassurance, and help seniors feel more comfortable and at ease as they adjust to their new living situation.

Overall, Green Lane Movers can help seniors make a smooth transition to assisted living by taking care of all of the details and providing the necessary support and assistance to allow seniors to continue living independently and thrive in their new home.
