Name: Learning Sponge
Description:
Our company is comprised of lifelong learners that come from a variety of backgrounds. We have been providing education/engagement for senior residential communities for over 13 years.  Our system adheres to  the following principles:

Provide a non-threatening and nurturing environment

Remember that the goal is not just the completion of tasks but the value behind challenging the mind.

Adapt any activity to the student -  give them the dignity of honoring what their skill levels are on each given day.  

Provide mentally challenging activities, such as learning a new skill, adopting a new hobby, or engaging in formal education. It is important to provide activities that expose older adults to new topics.

Allow residents to select activities they enjoy. This increases the likelihood that they will continue to engage in them over time.

Name: Welcome Aged Care Home - WACH (Opening in Falgun 2082 (March 2026)
Description:
At Welcome Aged Care Home (WACH), we believe that every individual deserves a life of comfort, respect, and specialized attention. Our facility is more than just a residence; it is a community built on the pillars of medical excellence and heartfelt compassion.

We provide professional care for senior citizens and other needy individuals, including sick people who require dedicated assistance that goes beyond what can typically be provided at home.

Our facility is designed to be a sanctuary. We have integrated safety features and medical accessibility to ensure that even the most vulnerable residents can navigate their environment safely. By blending professional healthcare with social engagement, we help prevent the isolation that often accompanies old age or long-term illness.


Our Care Philosophy: We understand that every resident has a unique story and specific health needs. Our approach combines clinical expertise with a personal touch to ensure that whether a resident is here for age-related support or recovery from illness, they feel truly "at home."

Comprehensive Services: 
Professional Nursing & Medical Support: Our team provides 24/7 monitoring and bedside care for the elderly and those suffering from acute or chronic illnesses.
Specialized Assistance for the Needy: We extend our services to individuals who require extra help due to physical disabilities or health setbacks, ensuring they never feel alone in their journey.

Rehabilitation & Recovery: With dedicated physiotherapy and mobility assistance, we help sick individuals regain their strength in a supportive environment.

Tailored Nutrition: We provide medically supervised meal plans that are both nutritious and suited to the specific health conditions of our residents.

Dignity-Centered Daily Living: From personal hygiene to medication management, we handle the daily details so our residents can focus on their well-being.

About Us: InspireCare, L.L.C.

At InspireCare, we are dedicated to providing top-notch consulting and delegation services. With over 15 years of extensive clinical experience, our founder and lead consultant, Katrina Koci-Myers, RN, brings a wealth of knowledge and expertise to the healthcare industry.

Our Mission:
At the core of InspireCare, is a commitment to elevating healthcare standards through effective delegation and expert consulting. We aim to empower healthcare professionals and institutions by optimizing their resources, enhancing resident care, and ensuring compliance with industry standards.

Services We Offer:

Nurse Consulting: Our seasoned RN and Founder offers comprehensive guidance to healthcare organizations, assisting them in streamlining processes, improving resident outcomes, and navigating complex regulatory landscapes.

Delegation Expertise: We specialize in delegation strategies, providing tailored solutions to assisted living and memory care communities seeking to optimize their staffing models. Our team ensures efficient task allocation while maintaining the highest standards of resident care.

Training and Education: InspireCare goes beyond consultancy by offering training programs designed to enhance the skills and knowledge of healthcare professionals. We offer Mental Health and Dementia Speciality Trainings.

Why Choose Us:

Experience: With over a decade of hands-on experience in Assisted Living and Memory Care, InspireCare brings a unique understanding of the challenges and opportunities within the industry.

Customized Solutions: We recognize that each community is unique. Our team works closely with clients to develop customized strategies that align with their specific goals and operational requirements.

Commitment to Excellence: InspireCare is driven by a passion for excellence in resident care.

Name: Alters- und Pflegeheim Günschmatte
Description:
Unser Glück: die wunderschöne Lage inmitten der Bergregion. Der Blick auf den Staubbachfall sowie ins Gletschermassiv des Silberhorns macht unseren Standort zu einem einmaligen Wohnerlebnis für unsere Bewohner und Bewohnerinnen; im Sommer grüne, unberührte Natur, im Winter eine atemberaubende, in Weiss gehüllte Schneelandschaft. Unser grosser Garten mit Terrasse lädt zum Verweilen ein und bietet Bewohnenden und Gästen einen Rundumblick ins Lauterbrunnental. Gerne servieren wir Ihnen etwas aus unserer Cafeteria Günschmatte.

Unser Wohnangebot ermöglicht es älteren und pflegebedürftigen Menschen, abgestimmt auf ihre Bedürfnisse am Alltag teilzunehmen. Das Team in der Pflege und die verantwortliche Ärztin sorgen für eine kompetente pflegerische und medizinische Versorgung. Die Physiotherapie ist bei Bedarf in der Nähe und mit Einzel- und Gruppensequenzen in der Aktivierung+Alltagsgestaltung umsorgen wir die Bewohnenden umfassend. Zum Bahnhof oder ins Dorf begleiten wir Bewohnende, Angehörige und Gäste mit unserem eigenen Auto, welches den Bedürfnissen im Alter, barrierefrei und inklusiv ausgestattet ist.

Wir sind als Stiftung organisiert und werden jährlich von der kantonalen Stiftungsaufsicht überprüft. Der Stiftungszweck dient dem Betrieb des Alters- und Pflegeheim Günschmatte. Organe der Stiftung sind der Stiftungsrat und die Revisionsstelle.

Name: Sensafe Care
Description:
Sensafe Care is an Australian-based organisation dedicated to driving change in the aged care sector through cutting-edge technology and sensitive, practical, safety solutions for residential aged care.

Our safety solutions are based on world-leading technologies and backed by a team of experienced engineers, technicians and integrators. 

Intelligent room monitoring for residential aged care
SenSafe by Sensafe Care is a person-centred resident safety monitoring solution developed for residential aged care to ensure staff are supported in delivering the highest level of care in aged care facilities through intelligence, information and alerts.

Detect Falls: Immediate accurate alerts mean reduced time on lying on the floor.

Bathroom visits: Identify potential medical issues and improve safety in the bathroom.

Proactive alerts: Reduce the incidence of serious injuries by monitoring predictors such as sitting on the edge of the bed, rocking and pacing.

Monitor social inclusion: Enhance resident safety and monitor room visits.

Time at Rest: Ensure comfort and mobility by sensing chair sleeps and lack of movement.

Protect privacy and dignity: The meta-data sensors are inconspicuous, non-invasive and do not record images or videos.


SenSafe monitors the safety of residents by detecting and analysing changes in a room. It uses meta-data sensors with advanced scene analysis to alert staff to possible safety concerns such as falls, injuries, or inconsistencies to regular routines and behaviours.

SenSafe communicates when residents can't. It enhances alert quality and accuracy while also providing better information to help staff respond appropriately every time.

SenSafe is a comprehensive room monitoring solution, eliminating the need for costly and ineffective wearables, call buttons, and pressure sensors.

Name: Stichting Wooninitiatief Natuurlijk Thuys
Description:
Stichting Wooninitiatief Natuurlijk Thuys is een ouderinitiatief voor het beschermd en begeleid wonen van 10-11  jongvolwassenen met een verstandelijke beperking. Een kleinschalige woonvorm met 24 uurs zorg. We willen dat onze bewoners in een warme sfeervolle omgeving kunnen wonen in een groene omgeving én dichtbij voorzieningen. Beschermd wonen en samen een familie vormen. Iedere bewoner is uniek en samen vormen zij een prachtig geheel. 

Wij gaan onze zorgvilla bouwen op Kloostergoed Theresiapark in Vught. Een prachtig landgoed, waar vroeger de zusters leefden. Een nieuwe woonomgeving waarbij het authentieke karakter wordt gekoesterd én verrijkt. Een heel bijzondere plek voor onze bijzondere bewoners. In totaal zullen er 156 nieuwbouwwoningen verrijzen in deze bestaande bos- en parkachtige setting.

Het is onze ambitie om zelf deze huisvesting te realiseren voor onze kinderen. Een enorme uitdaging, die nodig is om de toekomstbestendigheid voor het wonen met zorg te kunnen waarborgen. Wij krijgen hiervoor ondersteuning van andere stichtingen, die het belangrijk vinden dat mensen met een verstandelijke beperking ook echt kunnen meedoen binnen onze samenleving. Uiteraard blijven we zoeken naar hulp, expertise en donaties in welke vorm dan ook. Samen bouwen, voor onze prachtige jongeren.

Name: Changing Talk: Online Training (CHATO)
Description:
Researchers from the University of Kansas School of Nursing invite your nursing home staff to participate in our online training, Changing Talk: Online Training (CHATO).
 
This free training teaches nursing home staff how to reduce elderspeak (infantilizing communication) to improve patient behavior. When nursing home staff change the way they communicate with residents, the result is improved behavioral symptoms for residents with dementia.
 
About the study and training:
- Three contact hours/continuing education
- Qualifies for CMS dementia care training hour requirements
- Online format
- Free to participate
- Certificate of completion awarded
- National Institutes of Health-funded study
 
Learn more or contact us at http://www.kumc.edu/chato.

Name: Serenity Senior Living
Description:
Welcome to Serenity Senior Living
A Vibrant, Home-Like Community in the Heart of Pflugerville

Nestled on three serene acres along Gilleland Creek, Serenity Senior Living offers more than assisted living—we offer a place to belong. Located in a peaceful corner of Pflugerville, just outside Austin, our community has proudly served seniors and their families for over a decade with personalized care rooted in compassion, dignity, and connection.

At Serenity, our mission is clear: to provide exceptional care in an environment that’s Safe, Exceptional, Resilient, Efficient, and Nurturing. Every day, we strive to honor the rhythms of our residents’ lives—celebrating their independence while surrounding them with the comfort of community.

What Makes Serenity Feel Like Home
 Resident-Centered Living
We encourage each resident to bring the things that make them feel at home—photos, keepsakes, favorite books, and even beloved plants. Every suite becomes a reflection of the individual who lives there.

 Warm Community Appeal
Set along the tree-lined banks of Gilleland Creek, our campus features landscaped gardens, peaceful walking paths, and inviting indoor and outdoor spaces. Residents enjoy spacious private and semi-private rooms, safety-focused emergency response systems, and engaging social activities that promote both comfort and mobility.

 Personalized, Flexible Care
Whether it’s medication management, incontinence assistance, or support with daily living activities, our trained team offers a wide range of care tailored to each resident’s unique needs and abilities. We meet each person where they are—with warmth and respect.

At Serenity, we believe aging should be celebrated, not simply managed. That’s why our community is alive with gentle routines, joyful moments, and heartfelt care. Our residents are family—and every day, we’re honored to walk alongside them on this journey.

Serenity Senior Living—where care feels like home.

Description:

We support children aged 11–17 with Social, Emotional and Mental Health (SEMH) needs and Learning Disabilities (LD), providing safe, nurturing homes where young people can stabilise, grow and thrive. Our care is grounded in consistency, compassion and high professional standards, delivered by dedicated teams who genuinely care about long-term outcomes, not short-term fixes.

Everything we do is guided by our A-B-L-E values:

**Aspire** – We hold ambitious expectations for every child, helping them believe in their own potential and build positive futures.
**Belong** – Our homes are just that: homes. Places where children feel safe, accepted and part of something stable and meaningful.
**Love** – Care is at the heart of what we do. We lead with empathy, warmth and genuine human connection.
**Empower** – We give children the skills, confidence and voice to take control of their lives and make positive choices.

Able Health Care currently operates three specialist homes – Liberty Lodge, Fern Lodge and Oak Tree Lodge – each with its own personality, while sharing a consistent, high-quality care ethos. We work closely with local authorities across Suffolk, Norfolk, Essex and Cambridgeshire, offering transparent partnerships, robust safeguarding and strong outcomes.

As an organisation, we are ambitious and values-driven. Our goal is to become Suffolk’s leading independent children’s residential care provider, growing thoughtfully and sustainably while maintaining the warmth, quality and integrity that define our homes.

At Able Health Care, we don’t just provide care. We help children aspire, belong, feel loved and become empowered to build brighter futures.

Name: EHPAD de Vizille - Les Écrins
Description:
L’EHPAD Les Ecrins compte désormais 121 lits d’hébergement permanents répartis sur trois niveaux et 1 place d’hébergement temporaire. Au rez-de-chaussée, les deux UPG (unités psycho-gériatriques) accueillent 28 résidents et les deux niveaux supérieurs accueillent respectivement 47 personnes. Le PASA de 14 places (Pôle d’activités et de soins adaptés) a retrouvé ses anciens locaux rénovés. Ce service permet d’accueillir, dans la journée, les résidents ayant des troubles du comportement modéré, dans le but de proposer des activités sociales et thérapeutiques, individuelles ou collectives, afin de maintenir ou de réhabiliter les capacités fonctionnelles, les fonctions cognitives, sensorielles et les liens sociaux.

 

Par ailleurs, un service d’accueil de jour est proposé au sein de l’EHPAD. C’est une activité portée officiellement par l’EHAPD Abel Maurice et délocalisée deux fois par semaine à Vizille. Elle comprend 6 places et s’adresse principalement aux personnes âgées présentant une maladie d’Alzheimer ou troubles apparentés et vivant à domicile. C’est un lieu de rencontre favorisant le bien-être individuel des personnes, accueillies un ou plusieurs jours par semaine.

ResiTurn automatiza la creación de cuadrantes para residencias de mayores, teniendo en cuenta la normativa laboral, las condiciones de cada trabajador y las necesidades reales del centro.

El resultado: menos tiempo en gestión, menos errores y más tranquilidad para la dirección y los equipos.

ResiTurn está pensada específicamente para el sector residencial, no como un software genérico, sino como una solución práctica y especializada.

Si quieres reducir el tiempo que dedicas a los cuadrantes y ganar seguridad en la planificación, escríbenos.

Name: Linimed Südwest Kaiserslautern
Description:
Unser Pflegedienst ist Partner aller gesetzlichen und privaten Krankenversicherungen und hat qualitätsregulierende Ergänzungsvereinbarungen abgeschlossen.
Wir bieten eine umfassende Begleitung und Betreuung beginnend mit der Pflegeübernahme des Patienten schon vor der Entlassung aus der Klinik. Das hat für Sie den Vorteil, während des gesamten Überleitungsprozesses einen verbindlichen Ansprechpartner zu haben.
Wir unterstützen unsere Patienten und deren Angehörige bzw. Betreuungspersonen mit allen Informationen und Hilfe zur Pflegesituation und informieren Sie über alle Möglichkeiten einer ganzheitlichen außerklinischen Intensivpflege – zu Hause oder in einer unserer Wohngemeinschaften.
Wir begleiten die Patienten und deren Angehörige von Beginn an und nehmen uns Zeit, um neben dem Gesundheitszustand auch die individuellen und persönlichen Bedürfnisse zu erfassen und in die tägliche Pflege zu integrieren.
Unser Ziel ist die bestmögliche Lebensqualität für den Patienten zu erreichen und den Gesundheitszustand wenn möglich umfassend zu verbessern. Etwa durch Steigerung der Mobilität und der körperlichen Leistungsfähigkeit.
Wir klären mit Ihrer Krankenkassen bzw. Pflegekasse die Finanzierung und stehen in einem engen interdisziplinären Austausch mit Ärzten und Therapeuten.

Name: CuraZentrum Uchte gGmbH
Description:
Die CuraZentrum Uchte gGmbH bietet Kurzzeitpflege, Tagespflege und stationäre Pflege aus einer Hand. Die Standorte befinden sich in Uchte und Lavelsloh. 
In Uchte übernehmen wir für den Verein für Altenwohnstätten Uchte e.V. zudem die Vermittlung der benachbarten Seniorenwohnungen.

Unser Motto: Gepflegt älter werden
Leben verändert sich. Manchmal wird es schwieriger - vor allem, wenn man älter wird. Da schlägt eine Krankheit zu. Da muss plötzlich jemand gepflegt werden. Manchmal geht im Alter auch im wörtlichen Sinn eine Tür zu: Weil es alleine nicht mehr geht. Doch gerade dann hilft es zu wissen: Da gibt es einen Ort, da geht eine Tür wieder auf. Da sind Menschen, die unterstützen. Da gibt es Hilfe, die endlich entlastet. Da gibt es einen Ort, an dem Menschen gemeinsam Freude haben. Da gibt es Menschen, die wissen, wie das geht: professionell pflegen. Das ist das CuraZentrum Uchte!

Vertrauen wird durch Leistung und Transparent für alle am Pflegeprozess Beteiligten erreicht.

Individuelle Lebensgestaltung unserer Bewohner findet im Alltag höchste Priorität.

Teamgeist bewirkt, dass wir unserem hohen Qualitätsanspruch gerecht werden.

Anerkennung erhalten dient der Motivation.

Lebensgeschichte der Bewohner wird erfahren, berücksichtigt und wertgeschätzt.

Innovation und Fortbildung sichern Weiterentwicklung.

Soziale und wirtschaftliche Kompetenz tragen zusätzlich zum Schlüssel unseres Erfolges bei.

Name: InspiCare Homes, LLC
Description:
Are you looking for a place where compassion meets innovation? Look no further than InspiCare Homes!

At InspiCare Homes, we are more than just a healthcare institution; we are a home of hope, acceptance, and progress. We're dedicated to providing high-quality living experiences and services for individuals with intellectual and developmental disorders (IDD).

Our guiding principle is simple but profound: Every person, regardless of their abilities, deserves the best mental healthcare. We're committed to promoting independence, resilience, and wholeness in the lives of those we serve.

Our services are tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. We offer specialized care plans, inclusive therapeutic approaches, and dedicated support for family members. Community integration, sensory-friendly environments, and advocacy are at the heart of what we do.

But what truly sets us apart is our remarkable team of professionals – experienced therapists, skilled caregivers, and dedicated support staff. Together, we create a warm and inclusive environment where no one is left behind, and everyone can reach their full potential.

Join us at InspiCare Homes, where we are rewriting the story of IDD care. Together, let's build a brighter future filled with possibilities, growth, and a world where everyone is valued.

Name: Saint Anthony's Nursing And Rehab Center
Description:
St. Anthony's has been a leader in the field of skilled nursing and rehab for over 30 years. Our facility is in Rock Island, next to Augustana College and just minutes away from Trinity Medical Center West or the Illini Medical Center.

We offer fully furnished semi-private and private suites for those who are searching for a new place to live for their loved ones. Our staff is dedicated to providing the best possible care for your loved ones. St. Antony's Center is able to meet all your needs, whether it's long-term care or skilled nursing.


Skilled Nursing

St. Anthony's provides skilled nursing care around the clock, tailored to each individual's needs. Our Nursing Professionals are trained to provide the highest quality care, from the most complex to the simplest.

Rehabilitation Care

The rehabilitation process is stressful when recovering from a surgery, a fall or ill health. St. Anthony's can help you or your loved one with a specialized plan of recovery, including physical therapy and care. No matter how long or short your stay, we will have a plan of care that is tailored to the individual.

Name: Zorg Zwaan
Description:
Zorg-Zwaan is een kleinschalige 24-uurs woonvoorziening voor volwassenen met complexe gedragsproblematiek. Wij bieden een veilige, gestructureerde en warme leefomgeving voor mensen met psychiatrische aandoeningen, trauma, een licht verstandelijke beperking (LVB) en/of verslavingsproblematiek.

Onze zorg wordt volledig gefinancierd via het Persoonsgebonden Budget (PGB) en is bestemd voor cliënten met een WLZ-indicatie (VG3 t/m VG7) of een GGZ-profiel (GGZ 2/3). Gelegen in een rustige wijk, creëren wij een omgeving waarin cliënten zich gehoord, gezien en veilig voelen.

Bij Zorg-Zwaan combineren wij duidelijke structuur en heldere kaders met persoonlijke aandacht en betrokkenheid. 

Onze begeleiding is persoonsgericht en sluit aan op de unieke behoeften en mogelijkheden van iedere cliënt. Wij kijken verder dan diagnoses en werken samen aan herstel, het versterken van zelfredzaamheid en het vergroten van eigen regie.

Wat ons kenmerkt, is onze toewijding aan het bieden van een plek waar cliënten zich écht thuis voelen. Geen onpersoonlijke instelling, maar een warme omgeving waar ruimte is voor vertrouwen, groei en ontwikkeling.

Een Thuis, Geen Instelling.

Alanında uzman sağlık personeliyle 7/24 kesintisiz sağlık hizmeti Kronik hastalıkların takibi, düzenli doktor kontrolleri ve bireysel bakım desteği. Fiziksel ve ruhsal sağlığı destekleyen sosyal etkinlikler. Her bireyin ihtiyacına göre planlanmış kişisel bakım ve sağlık çözümleri.

Name: Creating Vibrant Days
Description:
PROGRAM LAUNCH COMING SEPTEMBER 2023
The word "activities" shouldn't strike fear into the hearts of memory care providers. Activities should be an engaging time where we smile and connect. Having been an Activity Director myself, I noticed one thing missing from memory care activity systems...vibrance. So often programs focus on the "what can you/can't you do" approach without considering if the activity brought joy to the residents. This program is tested in an actual memory care unit and has proven results. It has been designed to engage all lobes of the brain, but organically, through creating joy. We will provide assessment opportunities along with each activity. There are many ways to measure progress, and we hope to demonstrate the importance of taking field results rather than relying on structured tests that cause residents stress and point out failures. By utilizing our assessment structure, you can gain these results by simply observing the activities. We hope you follow us in the beginning stages while I am creating (and field testing) the necessary content. Feel free to reach out!

Name: Harmony Homes LA
Description:
Harmony Homes Adult Residential Facility recognizes the challenges & needs of a special population. Therefore, our purpose is to modify & operate an effective specialized adult residential care facility that accommodates up to four ambulatory male clients, ages 18-59. As such, we develop & implement a therapeutic milieu that addresses all aspects of the residents’ needs (e.g. physical, motor, medical, behavioral, psychiatric, social, recreational, communication, etc.). Additionally, we guarantee the safety of our ambulatory residents in the event of an emergency. 

Finally, this facility operates on a behavioral model, and treatment will focus on the individual needs of each resident. Programming will not be aversive but will focus on the principles of positive reinforcement. We provide emergency crisis intervention services (e.g., mental health/behavior modification, etc.) and have highly trained & qualified staff to support the needs of each resident. Our goal is to implement behavioral intervention plans (in the least restricted environment), designed to change the thinking, emotions, and behaviors of our ambulatory & aggressive residents. Essentially, our purpose will be to teach these individuals to cope.

Name: Northern Association of Family Councils
Description:
Northern Association of Family Councils (NAFC) is a Regional Association of Family Councils formally established in 2021. We are a group of committed volunteers who believe that the ongoing involvement of residents’ family, friends, and community will result in enhanced care and improved quality of life for LTC Residents.
NAFC invites independent (self-led, self-determining, democratic) “Family Councils” operating in long-term care (LTC) homes in the Northern Health Authority (NHA) to become members. Additionally, persons with lived experience in LTC may also be considered as members, e.g. a person who previously worked or volunteered in long-term care or had a loved one residing in care and may have belonged to a family council.
Members network to learn the ins and outs of the LTC system so they can advocate more effectively. They become familiar with legislation, regulations, polices and procedures in place and look for avenues to improve the resident experience and the LTC system.
